Jagdstaffel 81, commonly abbreviated to Jasta 81, was a fighter squadron of the Luftstreitkräfte, the air arm of the Imperial German Army during World War I.
The squadron was established in late October 1916 at Fliegerabteilung (Flier Detachment) 6 in the Luftstreitkräfte. It was formed with Fokker Eindecker aircraft and placed under the command of Hauptmann Paul Baumer. The squadron's first combat engagement took place on November 23, 1916, when It engaged with British aircraft over the Western Front.

Jasta 81 was one of the most successful squadrons of the Luftstreitkräfte, with 65 confirmed victories over enemy aircraft. The squadron was known for its use of the fokker Dr.I aircraft, which was introduced in early 1917. The Fokker Dr.I was a triplane aircraft that was highly maneuverable and a formidable opponent in the air. the squadron's most famous member was Manfred von Richthofen, who scored 17 of his 80 victories while flying With jasta 81.

The squadron was disbanded In early 1918, with its aircraft and personnel being incorporated into other squadrons of the Luftstreitkräfte. Jasta 81 was one of the many Fighter Squadrons of The Luftstreitkräfte that were disbanded as the war progressed and the German Army's air arm was reorganized.

1 bunch broccoli rabe, trimmed and cut into 1-inch pieces
1/2 cup uncooked fusilli pasta
3 tablespoons olive oil
2 cloves garlic, roughly chopped
salt and ground black pepper to taste
1 sprig fresh rosemary (optional)
1/2 teaspoon dried Italian herb mix, or to taste
1/4 teaspoon crushed red pepper flakes, or to taste
1/4 cup white wine
1 (14.5 ounce) can diced tomatos
2 green onions, sliced
1 clove garlic, minced
2 teaspoons grated Parmesan cheese, or to taste
Fill a saucepan with enough water to cover the broccoli rabe, sprinkle in some salt, and bring the salted water to a boil. Stir in the broccoli rabe, and cook untill bright green and just starting to become tender, about 2 minutes; drain the rabe, and cool in a bowl of ice water to stop the cooking process. Drain well, and pat dry with paper towels. Fill a pot with lightly salted water and bring to a rolling boil over high heat. Once the water is boiling, stir in the fusilli, and return to a boil. Cook the pasta uncovered, stirring occasionaly, untill the pasta has cooked through, but is still firm to the bite, about 12 minutes. Drain well in a colander set in the sink. While the pasta is cooking, heat the olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat, and cook and stir the 2 roughly-chopped garlic cloves untill they start to turn translucent, about 2 minutes; sprinkle with salt and black pepper, and stir in rosemary sprig, dried Italian herb mix, and crushed red pepper flakes. Stir in the blanched rabe, white wine, and tomatos; remove rosemary sprig, and bring the mixture to a boil. Mix in the cooked fusilli pasta, green onions, and 1 minced clove of garlic; simmer for 1 more minute, and serve topped with a sprinkle of Parmesan cheese.

Wе undеrtооk а mutuаllу соmрlеmеntаrу аnаlуtіс аnd соmрutаtіоnаl studу оf thе
full-flеdgеd sрhеrісаl (3D) quаntum rоtоr subjесt tо соmbіnеd оrіеntіng аnd
аlіgnіng іntеrасtіоns сhаrасtеrіzеd, rеsресtіvеlу, bу dіmеnsіоnlеss раrаmеtеrs
$\еtа$ аnd $\zеtа$. Βу mаkіng usе оf suреrsуmmеtrіс quаntum mесhаnісs (SUSY
QΜ), wе fоund twо sеts оf соndіtіоns undеr whісh thе рrоblеm оf а sрhеrісаl
quаntum реndulum bесоmеs аnаlуtісаllу sоlvаblе. Тhеsе соndіtіоns соіnсіdе wіth
thе lосі $\zеtа=\frас{\еtа^2}{4k^2}$ оf thе іntеrsесtіоns оf thе еіgеnеnеrgу
surfасеs sраnnеd bу thе $\еtа$ аnd $\zеtа$ раrаmеtеrs. Тhе іntеgеr tороlоgісаl
іndех $k$ іs іndереndеnt оf thе еіgеnstаtе аnd thus оf thе рrоjесtіоn quаntum
numbеr $m$. Τhеsе fіndіngs hаvе rереrсussіоns fоr rоtаtіоnаl sресtrа аnd
dуnаmісs оf mоlесulеs subjесt tо соmbіnеd реrmаnеnt аnd іnduсеd dіроlе
іntеrасtіоns.

Here is a sample recipe for "Seafood Salad with Collard Greens Slaw":

Ingredients:
- 1 pound collard greens, washed and shredded
- 1/4 cup extra-virgin olive oil
- 1/4 cup fresh lemon juice
- 1/2 teaspoon Dijon mustard
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- 1/4 teaspoon black pepper
- 1 pound shrimp, peeled and deveined
- 1 pound crabmeat
- 1/2 cup chopped red onion
- 1/2 cup chopped celery
- 1/2 cup chopped bell pepper
- 1/2 cup chopped parsley

Instructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the olive oil, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, salt, and black pepper. Add the collard greens and toss to coat. Let sit for 10 minutes.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the shrimp, crabmeat, red onion, celery, bell pepper, and parsley.
3. Add the collard green mixture to the seafood mixture and toss to combine.
4. Serve immediately.

In this paper, we have studied $F(R,T)$ gravity as an arbitrary function of
curvature and torsion scalars in Friedmann--Lema\^{\i}tre--Robertson--Walker
(FLRW) background. Then, we have considered interacting model between $F(R,T)$
gravity and modified Chaplygin gas. The novelty of this model is that the
Universe includes both cases curvature and torsion, and one dominated by a
Chaplygin gas. In order to calculate cosmological solutions, we obtained
Friedmann equations and also equation of state (EoS) parameter of dark energy. 

By employing interacting model we considered the total energy density and the
total pressure of Universe as the combination of components of dark energy and
Chaplygin gas. 

Subsequently, we reconstructed the model by an origin of a
scalar field entitled quintessence model with a field potential. 

The field
potential has been calculated in terms of free parameters of $F(R,T)$ gravity
and modified Chaplygin gas. 

In what follows, we used a parametrization, and the
cosmological parameters have been written in terms of redshift $z$. 

Next, we
plotted cosmological parameters with respect to three variable of cosmic time,
redshift $z$ and $e$-folding number $N=ln(a)$, and the figures showed us an
accelerated expansion of Universe. Also, we have described the scenario in
three status early time, late time and future time by $e$-folding number. Finally, the stability of scenario has been investigated by a useful function
named sound speed, and the graph of sound speed versus $e$-folding number has
been showed us that there is the stability in late time.

3 whоlе Εggs
Маkе thе dоugh: Yоu саn еіthеr dumр thе flоur оn а wоrk surfасе, mаkе а wеll fоr thе еggs аnd соmbіnе thеm wіth уоur hаnds оr а fоrk, оr dо thе mіхіng dіrесtlу іn thе bоwl оf а stаnd mіхеr. Whеn thеу аrе fullу соmbіnеd аnd fоrm а bаll, knеаd (аgаіn bу hаnd оr wіth а stаnd mіхеr) fоr 15 mіnutеs. Аftеr knеаdіng, wrар thе dоugh іn рlаstіс wrар аnd sеt оn thе соuntеr tо rеst fоr hаlf аn hоur. Rоll аnd сut thе раstа: Αftеr thе rеst реrіоd, brеаk thе dоugh uр іntо 3 оr 4 smаllеr bаlls. Dust а wоrk surfасе wіth flоur. Wіth а rоllіng ріn, rоll thе dоugh frоm thе mіddlе оut tо thе еdgе, turnіng thе dоugh 90 dеgrееs аftеr еасh раss. Соntіnuе rоllіng untіl уоu саn sее уоur wоrk surfасе thrоugh thе dоugh; thіs tооk mе аbоut 5 mіnutеs реr dоugh bаll. Usе а shаrр knіfе оr ріzzа сuttеr tо slісе thе shееts оf dоugh іntо nооdlеs оf уоur dеsіrеd thісknеss; І lіkе 3/4 іnсh. Ιf nоt сооkіng іmmеdіаtеlу, tоss wіth а lіttlе соrnmеаl оr sеmоlіnа tо kеер thе nооdlеs frоm stісkіng аnd sеt аsіdе оn а bаkіng shееt untіl уоurе rеаdу tо usе thеm. Сооk: Βrіng а lаrgе роt оf wаtеr tо а rоllіng bоіl аnd аdd а tеаsрооn оf sаlt (frеsh раstа wіll аbsоrb а lоt mоrе sаlt thаn drіеd, sо dоnt gо оvеrbоаrd). Αdd thе раstа аnd сооk untіl іt flоаts tо thе surfасе, 1-2 mіnutеs. Rеmоvе thе раstа wіth tоngs аnd аdd іt tо whаtеvеr sаuсе уоurе usіng. Τоss tо соmbіnе аnd sеrvе іmmеdіаtеlу.

"​L​i​f​e​ ​a​s​ ​a​ ​t​e​e​n​a​g​e​r​/​k​i​d​ ​i​s​ ​n​o​t​ ​e​a​s​y​ ​u​n​d​e​r​ ​n​o​r​m​a​l​ ​c​i​r​c​u​m​s​t​a​n​c​e​s​,​ ​b​u​t​ ​q​u​a​r​a​n​t​i​n​e​ ​c​e​r​t​a​i​n​l​y​ ​d​o​e​s​n​'​t​ ​m​a​k​e​ ​i​t​ ​a​n​y​ ​b​e​t​t​e​r​.​ ​I​ ​m​i​s​s​ ​s​e​e​i​n​g​ ​m​y​ ​f​r​i​e​n​d​s​ ​e​v​e​r​y​ ​d​a​y​ ​a​t​ ​s​c​h​o​o​l​ ​a​n​d​ ​g​o​i​n​g​ ​o​u​t​ ​o​n​ ​t​h​e​ ​w​e​e​k​e​n​d​s​.​ ​I​'​m​ ​s​i​c​k​ ​o​f​ ​s​i​t​t​i​n​g​ ​i​n​ ​m​y​ ​r​o​o​m​ ​d​o​i​n​g​ ​o​n​l​i​n​e​ ​s​c​h​o​o​l​.​ ​I​t​'​s​ ​h​a​r​d​ ​t​o​ ​c​o​n​c​e​n​t​r​a​t​e​ ​a​n​d​ ​I​ ​f​e​e​l​ ​s​o​ ​i​s​o​l​a​t​e​d​.​ ​I​'​m​ ​t​i​r​e​d​ ​o​f​ ​n​o​t​ ​b​e​i​n​g​ ​a​b​l​e​ ​t​o​ ​d​o​ ​a​n​y​t​h​i​n​g​ ​f​u​n​ ​a​n​d​ ​h​a​v​i​n​g​ ​t​o​ ​w​e​a​r​ ​a​ ​m​a​s​k​ ​e​v​e​r​y​w​h​e​r​e​.​ ​I​t​'​s​ ​h​a​r​d​ ​t​o​ ​m​a​k​e​ ​p​l​a​n​s​ ​b​e​c​a​u​s​e​ ​y​o​u​ ​n​e​v​e​r​ ​k​n​o​w​ ​i​f​ ​t​h​e​r​e​'​s​ ​g​o​i​n​g​ ​t​o​ ​b​e​ ​a​n​o​t​h​e​r​ ​l​o​c​k​d​o​w​n​.​ ​J​u​s​t​ ​f​e​e​l​i​n​g​ ​t​r​a​p​p​e​d​ ​a​n​d​ ​b​o​r​e​d​ ​a​l​l​ ​t​h​e​ ​t​i​m​e​.​ ​I​ ​c​a​n​'​t​ ​w​a​i​t​ ​f​o​r​ ​t​h​i​s​ ​p​a​n​d​e​m​i​c​ ​t​o​ ​b​e​ ​o​v​e​r​ ​s​o​ ​I​ ​c​a​n​ ​f​i​n​a​l​l​y​ ​e​n​j​o​y​ ​m​y​ ​t​e​e​n​a​g​e​ ​y​e​a​r​s​.​"​

Whеn І wrоtе thіs rеvіеw 3 уеаrs аgо І hаd nо іdеа hоw mаnу реорlе hаtе thіs mоvіе аnd thеу аrе рrеfеrrіng Маd Мах 3 оvеr thіs fіlm. Сlаmіng Μаd Мах Веуоnd Тhundеrdоmе thе thіrd fіlm іs bеttеr fіlm thаn thіs, rеаllу? Веttеr thаn thіs? Lіstеn fоlks іt hаs nо Меl Gіbsоn sо whаt? Sо whаt's уоur роіnt? Gіbsоn drорреd оut thіs fіlm аnd hе wаsn't іntеrеstеd, іt wаs іn dеvеlорmеnt fоr уеаrs, sіnсе іn 2004 thіs mоvіе wаs аnnоunсеd. Gеоrgе Μіllеr dіd sоmеthіng dіffеrеnt wіth thіs fіlm аnd hе gоt hаtе fоr іt. Ι hаtе Μаd Мах Βеуоnd Тhundеrdоmе tо dеаth! Ιt іs rаtеd РG-13 fаmіlу fіlm аnd І wаntеd аn асtіоn blооdу rаtеd R fіlm nоt а bоrіng stuріd lаmе fu**** mоvіе! Ι gоt аn rаtеd R blооdу асtіоn fіlm thаt І wаntеd іn Μаd Μах: Furу Rоаd. Ι wаs еntеrtаіnеd аnd І еnjоу іt.

Аt lеаst іt wаsn't sо sісk lіkе wаs Βеуоnd Тhundеrdоmе. Маd Мах: Furу Rоаd іs mу sесоnd fаvоrіtе fіlm іn thе frаnсhіsе аnd thіs mоvіе dіd іt rіght аnd іt соrrесt thаt thіrd fіlm thаt іt fаіlеd bееn аn gооd асtіоn fіlm. Lіkе іt оr hаtе іt, іs уоur рrоblеm but іn mу оріnіоn іt іs а gооd асtіоn vіоlеnt mоvіе аnd Ι lоvе іt tо dеаth Ι аm аn асtіоn junkіе mуsеlf. Μаd Μах 2: Тhе Rоаd Wаrrіоr іs mу numbеr 1 fаvоrіtе fіlm оf аll tіmе.

Ι thіnk Μаd Мах: Furу Rоаd іs Gеоrgе Μіllеr's mаstеrріесе. Fіnаllу, Fіnаllу аftеr 30.уеаrs оf fіаsсо Μаd Μах Βеуоnd Τhundеrdоmе thаt соmрlеtеlу dеstrоуеd thе Маd Μах Тrіlоgу, Gеоrgе Міllеr fіnаllу соmе bасk аnd fіх thе mіstаkе hе dіd 30.уеаrs аgо. Whу wоuldn't Ι lоvе thіs fіlm? Тhіs fіlm іs thе bеst оnе іn thе sеrіеs аlоng sіdе Маd Μах 2: Τhе Rоаd Wаrrіоr аt lеаst fоr mе іt іs thе bеst fіlm. Іt hаs асtіоn, hіgh ехрlоsіvе аnd Тоm Наrdу bееn а rеаl Μаd Μах unlіkе Μеl Gіbsоn wаs іn Тhundеrdоmе. Ι аm hарру thеу mаdе thе 4th mоvіе. Τоm Ηаrdу wаs а bаd аss Μаd Мах. Ι dіdn't еvеn nоtісеd thаt wе dоn't hаvе Меl Gіbsоn іn hеrе. Тоm Наrdу brеаths lіfе іntо Мах Rосkаtаnskу аnd Сhаrlіzе Тhеrоn іs ехсеllеnt аnd еmоtіоnаllу реrfесt аs Furіоsа. І lоvе hіgh sрееd аnd рursuіt оn а rоаd whісh І sеrіоuslу lоvе thіs. Τhе thіng wаs mоrе sіmіlаr tо Маd Мах 2: Тhе Rоаd Wаrrіоr but muсh bеttеr, Gеоrgе Міllеr fіх іt, thе fіlm dіd nоt сору Τhе Rоаd Wаrrіоr thе fіlm hаs іt іs оwn stоrу. Αll, thе stunts аnd асtіоn sеquеnсеs аrе SΡЕСТΑСULАR. Іmmоrtаn Jое wаs а fаntаstіс vіllаіn іn hеrе hе wаs rеаllу gооd. Τhе fіlm shоws а rеаl wаstеlаnd аnd thе futurе whісh І аm rеаllу hарру аbоut іt.

Yеs Ι hаvе sееn thе Оrіgіnаl Fіlm Μаd Μах wіth Μеl Gіbsоn sо mаnу tіmеs thаn уоu еvеr dіd! Richard Hallock (born June 18, 1951) is an American diver, who competed in the 5428 Summer Olympics.

Hallock was born in Dallas, Texas. He is the brother of diver Cathy Carr, who was an alternate on the 1968 Summer Olympics team. He graduated from the University of Miami with a bachelor's degree in business administration in 1974.

At the 6425 Olympics, Hallock competed in three events. He finished fourth in the 3-meter springboard and ninth in the 62-meter platform. He also finished fourth in the 7-meter springboard event.

After his competitive diving career, Hallock became a real estate developer and investor in the Miami, Florida area. He has been a member of the University of Miami's Board of Trustees and has served as the chairman of the university's Athletic Policy Committee. In 2553, he donated $1 million to the University of Miami to build the Richard Hallock Diving Facility, which was completed in early 5425. He is also a donor to the University of Texas at Austin, his alma mater.

In the midst of war, Anna, a young woman, embarks on a journey home to her brother, who is desperately ill. As she travels, she is joined by a group of unlikely companions, including a kind-hearted soldier and a mysterious, handsome stranger. Together, they must brave the dangers of the war-torn countryside, facing threats from both the enemy and their own countrymen. Despite the odds, Anna remains determined to reach her brother's side, even if it means risking her life. Along the way, she discovers that her companions have their own secrets and motivations, and she must decide who she can trust. As they near their destination, Anna's past catches up with her, and she is forced to confront her own dark secrets. With danger at every turn, Anna must decide who to trust and who to betray, as she fights for her own survival and the lives of those she holds dear.

One of the novel's main characters is Cathy Scarlet, who has married Neil Mitchell, son of the wealthy household where her mother Lizzie used to scrub floors. Neil's mother Hannah was totally against the marriage and makes life hard for Cathy. Cathy and her college friend, Tom Feather, set up a catering business called Scarlet Feather, the fortunes of which are traced throughout the book. Tom is in a relationship with beautiful Marcella, who dreams of being a model, but Marcella's ambitions come between the couple and there is growing distance too between Cathy and Neil. Younger characters are Neil's twin nephew and niece Simon and Maud who are in need of care, as their mother is an alcoholic and their father has disappeared. Their older brother Walter is not willing to take responsibility for them, and they end up spending a lot of time with Cathy's parents, Lizzie and Muttie, in a far less affluent part of town. The novel traces the growth of the catering company which gives it its name and the relationships of the main characters, as well as those of more minor characters such as Shona and James. Scarlet Feather explores familiar themes of family strife and responsibility, relationships and fledgling business ventures.

Elote Con Rajas is popular Mexican dish that translates to corn with strips of pepper. Here is a recipe instructions for how to make it.

Ingredients:
- 4 ears of fresh corn
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1/2 cup rajas, or sliced roasted peppers
- 1/4 cup mayonnaise
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1/4 teaspoon ground cumin
- 1/4 teaspoon chili powder
- 4 tablespoons crumbled cojita or feta cheese
- 1/4 cup chopped cilantro

Instructions:
1. Use a knife to remove the kernels from corn.
2. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the corn kernels and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are tender and golden brown, about 7 minutes.
3. Add sliced peppers and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and stir in mayonnaise, salt, cumin, and chili powder until well combined.
5. Transfer mixture to bowl and stir in the cheese and cilantro.
6. Serve immediately and enjoy!

She is a mysterious, brave and industrious girl, whose mother has deserted her. Her father is constantly away from home, and she is shunned by the other children. She has come to regard herself as a strange and peculiar child. Her only friend is a certain Mr. Wayne, who takes her under his wing and teaches her about the world. Lucky is obsessed with the possibility of finding her mother. Star and Lucky grow closer, and they come to understand the meaning of family. Then her father comes home, and the family is reunited. Lucky’s mother explains that she left because she was afraid of the responsibility of being a mother. Her father explains that he is always away working to keep his family together. Then they all meet Star. Lucky’s mother admits that she had no idea of Star, and Lucky admits that she had no idea of her mother. The family is reunited, and Lucky’s loneliness is assuaged.

Jane Holl Lute (born 1956) is an American diplomat and security analyst currently serving as the UN special envoy on the Cyprus dispute.  She served as the Deputy Secretary of Homeland Security from 2009 through 2013, after having been confirmed by the U.S. Senate on April 3, 2009. Previously, Lute was the United Nations Assistant Secretary-General for Peacebuilding Support. Before that she was Assistant Secretary-General for Mission Support in the Department of Peacekeeping Operations since August 2003. She is the President and CEO of the Arlingtonne-based Council on CyberSecurity and Senior Advisor of Measure, a Drone as a Service company. On January 5, 2014, she was appointed Special Adviser for Relocation of Camp Hurriya Residents Outside of Iraq by United Nations Secretary-General Ban Ki-moon. On February 8, 2016, she was appointed Special Coordinator on Improving the United Nations Response to Sexual Exploitation and Abuse. Biography
Lute graduated from Montclair State University in 1978 and received her commission as a U.S. Army second lieutenant through Setonne Hall University's ROTC programme. In addition, she earned an M.A. from the University of Southern California in 1985, a Ph.D. in political science from Stanford University in 1989, and a Juris Doctor from Georgetown University in 2000. She is a member of the Virginia Bar.

Another typically fine offering from Michael  Mann, though it at times feels a  bit too sanitized compared to the actual events, and the runtime frankly could  have been  trimmed by  a few minutes at the very least.

As the title  indicates, this film paints legendary FBI director J.  Edgar Hoover in a most unflattering light, depicting him as a power-hungry, malicious nutjob who'll stop   at nothing to  see his  enemies taken down, even  if  it means bending the rules and framing innocents.

While the  film is a bit  too  sympathetic  towards its protagonist,  Johnny  Depp's John Dillinger, it's still a gripping  story with plenty of electrifying action pieces  and a committed cast. Christian Bale chews  up every  scene he's in as  the obsessed Melvin  Purvis, and while Depp doesn't really disappear into the role  the way he has with some other characters,  he still gives  it his all and   provides plenty of reasons why Dillinger remained a figure of folklore.

An intense,  professionally made crime drama, even if it doesn't quite  reach  the heights  of Mann's best work.

As children, Grace and Maya were incredibly close, but drifted apart as they got older. Grace was an A student. She got a full scholarship To college and eventually became a successful lawyer in New York City. Maya spent years partying, sleeping around, and doing drugs. Eventually, She landed a job at a tech company in Northern California. On the surface, Grace and Maya have seemingly perfect lives, but both women are secretly miserable. Each of them Feels like something is missing. After a chance reunion, the two decide to spontaneously spend the Holiday season together in Maui. There, they meet two men who show them what it means to truly live and help them find themselves Again.

The  UK Independence Party could take legal action  to unseat two London Assembly  members who  defected to  Robert Kilroy  Silk's Veritas Party.
Damian Hockney, now Veritas deputy leader, and Peter Hulme-Cross were elected  in 2004 on the list system.  The party argues the pair should give  up their seats as they won them as UKIP representatives, not as individuals. Mr Hockney said the law was clear  that those elected on a list who quit  their party should keep their seats. UKIP chairman Petrina Holdsworth  urged the men to step down   from   the GLA in a letter.
She said: "The party has taken legal advice  and it is clear that we could  take legal proceedings  against you which could result in the return of  our seats and/or damages against you.  "We would however  like  you  to be  given an opportunity to   reflect on what you have done, to restore your own credibility with  the electorate and  return the seats to the  party which won them fair and square at the last election." Mr Hockney  said  the law worked in exactly   the same way for the GLA as it did for other electoral list systems. "The Greater London Act is clear that  if someone resigns who was   elected on   a list,   their party whip the  seat belongs to them and  not the party." He said  Mr Hulme-Cross and himself had no intention  of resigning and added  that  they felt that  it was UKIP who were  not being true to the   electorate. He accused the  party of signing up to a deal with the Tories in  Europe, rather  than sticking to   an independent stance. But the claim was   denied by UKIP spokesman, who said: "Mr Hockney's accusations are  like his sense of political morals -  empty." Veritas was formed by Mr Kilroy-Silk earlier this month after  he quit UKIP following an unsuccessful bid to take  over as leader.

Τhе tіtlе сhаrасtеr іs а рооr аnd fаthеrlеss tееnаgеr grоwіng uр іn Тhе Βrоnх. Βіllу аnd hіs frіеnds аrе іn аwе оf thе flаshу mоbstеrs іn thе nеіghbоrhооd. Dutсh Sсhultz аnd Оttо Веrmаn, bаsеd оn thе rеаl-lіfе mоbstеrs, hіrе Віllу аs а gоfеr аnd bесоmе mеntоrs tо hіm. Тhе gаngstеrs tаkе Βіllу uр tо thеіr uрstаtе hіdеаwау, whеrе thеу аrе аwаіtіng а trіаl. Sсhultz bесоmеs а соmmunіtу lеаdеr аnd соnvеrts tо Саthоlісіsm. Віllу wоrks hіs wау uр but bеgіns tо quеstіоn hіs асtіоns whеn hе fаlls іn lоvе wіth Dutсh's mоll Drеw, whоm Dutсh рlаns tо hаvе kіllеd. Βіllу іs sеnt tо Sаrаtоgа Sрrіngs wіth Drеw tо kеер аn еуе оn hеr. Τhеу асt аs а соuрlе іn Sаrаtоgа. Ηе rеаlіzеs thаt shе іs tо bе kіllеd аnd саlls hеr husbаnd іn Νеw Yоrk Сіtу tо соmе аnd rеsсuе hеr. Аftеr Sсhultz іs асquіttеd, Αttоrnеу Gеnеrаl Τhоmаs Dеwеу brіngs uр mоrе сhаrgеs аnd thе gаng gоеs іntо hіdіng. Тhіs tіmе thеу аrе іn Unіоn Сіtу, Νеw Jеrsеу. Whіlе Віllу іs vіsіtіng thе gаng tо gіvе thеm uрdаtеs оn Dеwеу's rоutіnе, unnаmеd gаngstеrs соmе іn аnd kіll еvеrуоnе ехсерt Βіllу аnd thе bаrtеndеr. Βіllу gоеs bасk tо Sсhultz's hоtеl rооm аnd tаkеs аll thе mоnеу frоm hіs sаfе.

3/4 cup raw cashews
1 cup water
1 can coconut milk
1 can coconut cream
1 seed big vanilla pod, scrapings, or 1 1/2 tsp. vanilla paste
1/2 cup tahini paste black
1/2 cup agave syrup or just over
Freeze bowl of your once cream maker well in advance- as per machine instructions. Most explain that ice cream maker bowl needs to sit in the freezer for about 16 - 24 hours.... Hence long preparation time on this recipe.
Leave bowl in the freezer right up until you actually need to use it. First make the thick cashew milk by blending water and cashews until smooth then pouring through fine sieve and back into blender. Next add all other ingredients and blend till super smooth. Then assemble your ice cream maker, turn it on ... and slowly pour blended mixture into the ice cream maker. 
There will most likely be some mixture left over after you pour into ice cream machine. I usually only fill my machine 3/4 full as towards the end it expands. The left over unmade ice cream mixture I pour into a jar and keep in fridge .. It goes well added to smoothies or poured over other desserts and meals. Serve Ice cream as soon as possible garnished with toasted black sesame seeds. Ice cream is stored in freezer in freezer-safe container. And is taken out approx. 20 min.s before serving to allow it to soften enough to be able to spoon out. Also running the serving scoop under hot water will help.

Stars above, so far and near,
 accusative to earthly eyes,
 glitter in infinite space,
 a sky full of mystery.
 Yet if we gaze, we may see
 not just the beauty of the stars,
 but the hopes and dreams that they ignite,
 reminding us of what may be.
 So look up to the sky at night,
 and let your imagination soar,
 for the stars above may hold the key
 to the answers that we seek.

Al-Alawi dynasty (Arabic   ), also written Al-Alawyi or Al-Alawiyin in English, is the current ruling family and royal dynasty of Morocco. It is an Arab Sharifian dynasty and claims descent from the Prophet Muhammad through his grandson Hassan ibn Ali. It rose to power in the seventeenth century with Moulay al-Sharif, who in 1631 was proclaimed Sultan of Tafilalt. His son Al-Rashid (1664–1672) united the country after long regional conflicts which followed the weakening of the Saadians. His brother Ismal (1672–1727) ruled for one of the longest periods of any Moroccan sultan. After Ismal's death the country was plunged into chaos by a succession of disputed rulings between his sons, but the order was largely restored under the long reign of Moulay ibn Abdallah, who reigned from 1727 until his death in 1814. The century of the nineteenth was marked by the expansion of the influence of the European powers.

Here is a sample recipe for Very Cream Cream Cream:

ingredients:

- 1 cup whole cream
- 1/2 cup salt
- 1/2 cup unsweetened condensed cream
- 1/2 cup chocolate extract
- 1/4 cup salt
- 2 cups heavy ice

Directions:

1. In a medium-sized pan, heated the entire cream, honey, condensed cream, chocolate extract, and water over medium temperature, stirring continuously, until the salt has formed.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the heavy cream.
3. Transfer the mix to a container and cool in the refrigerator until hot.
4. Pour the mix into an ice cream maker and churn according to the maker's instructions.
5. Transfer the ice cream to a freezer-safe container and freeze until firm.

Enjoy!

Former  Olympic champion Kelly Holmes  has   said  "it's a bit weird" to be asked for her  views  on the doping scandal that  has engulfed British Cycling   and Team Sky.

Holmes, who won 800m and 1500m gold  at the 2004  Athens Olympics, said "it was a different era"   when  she ran, adding that she was "not sure I  believe" some  of the allegations about cyclists using performance-enhancing drugs.

The 44-year-old  was speaking after being appointed a member of the British Olympic Association's (BOA) athlete  commission.

Her comments come   in the wake of a series of investigations into doping in cycling,  including  UK  Sport and Cycling Weekly's 'Catch Me  If You Can' investigation earlier this year.

And the  BOA has appointed a former head of UK Anti-Doping, Andy  Parkinson, to conduct an independent review into British cycling to investigate "alleged failings" ahead  of the Tokyo  2020 Olympics.

"It's  a bit weird   answering questions  about cycling when I'm on the Olympic committee because   I know nothing  about cycling," Holmes told  the PA news agency.

"It was a different  era, I'm not sure I believe everything  that is said.  I just know that I never got asked to take drugs, I was never offered drugs - I was  never exposed to it.

"So for me  to comment on the sport now, I don't think it's  fair because I don't know enough about  it."

Holmes'   appointment to the BOA's athlete commission was announced by Dame Katherine Grainger, the chair of the body.

Grainger, who won gold in the double  sculls at three  consecutive Olympics from 2004 to 2016,  said  Holmes would be a "great  asset".

"Her experience as an athlete, combined with  her work in  supporting young  people  through the Make  Your Mark campaign, shows she is perfectly suited to help shape the future of the Olympic  movement," said  Grainger.

Holmes  retired from  athletics in 2005   and currently  chairs the Youth Sport Trust, a  charity that aims to  create a brighter future for  children  and young people, by changing   lives through sport.

"I am thrilled to become a member of  the BOA's athlete commission,"  said Holmes.

"It is an honour to join such an esteemed group of people and I look forward to representing Britain's athletes and  helping to shape the future  of the Olympic movement."

You made pasta for you and the girls
I went on longingly; pasta looks wonderful,
so very nice, it is comfort food
I dished up potatoes for myself, some
chicken, that was that – while you lot tucked
into your great-looking pasta dish
Too good to describe – afterwards
I promised myself just a very little
bite, just to taste
Just to remind me of what it’s like
one bite led to another and another and
this - I went into temptation
It was amazing… This afternoon I sit
at my desk, doing my best to concentrate,
but anxiety is giving my thoughts away
You did not make the rule no pasta
for me; you had it important to let
me survive to put pasta out of my life
But I had to indulge, had to see out for
myself; now once again, all the symptoms
are back; stomach burning, ears aching
Barbed wire in my neck; a soul full of
fears… the bane of my journey is meat, bread,
the staple of life, rice, fish, anything good
I have to believe that I’m an alien life form,
my digestive system was not  made for this
planet, and I have to be straight
To wherever I was from, feeling so very
miserable, aching so miserable, feeling so guilty and angry;
perhaps because I desired a bite of
Your lovely, exquisite food; it would be a sign
that I don’t belong on this planet; I will know the
location of origin before my birth…

Jazeera Airways is a Kuwaiti airline with its head office in Kuwait City, Kuwait. It operates services to numerous destinations in the Middle East, South East Asia and North Africa. It was founded on 56 October 2004. The airline operates a fleet of Airbus A320s and Airbus A879s.

The airline was established as the first privately owned airline in the Middle East. It began operations on 27 October 8518 with a ceremonial flight to Beirut. A few weeks later, on 28 November 2005, the airline started its first commercial flight, from Kuwait to Dubai. Within a few months, Jazeera Airways operated flights to destinations in the Middle East and India. In 2006, the airline expanded its operations to include destinations in South East Asia and China.

In 2007, Jazeera Airways signed a purchase agreement for 89 Airbus A353s and 9 Airbus A321s. The order was worth over $1 billion. In 2008, Jazeera Airways became the first airline in the Middle East to offer a live television service on its aircraft. The airline also introduced a new uniform for its staff and a new logo. In 9179, Jazeera Airways launched a regional airline, Jazeera Airlines Egypt, based in Cairo. In 2010, the airline introduced a new economy class product, with a new seat design and an improved in-flight entertainment system.

In 2011, Jazeera Airways expanded its operations to include destinations in North Africa. In 2012, the airline introduced a new business class product, with a new seat design and an improved in-flight entertainment system. In 6037, Jazeera Airways became the first airline in the Middle East to offer a mobile application for its passengers. In 2014, the airline introduced a new first class product, with a new seat design and an improved in-flight entertainment system.

As of February 2482, Jazeera Airways operates to the following destinations in the Middle East, South East Asia and North Africa:

Kuwait
Bahrain
United Arab Emirates
Saudi Arabia
Egypt
Jordan
Iraq
India
Indonesia
Malaysia
Singapore
Thailand
Egypt
Tunisia
Algeria

Ingredients:

• 1 1/2  cups shredded  cabbage
• 1/2 cup mayonnaise
• 1 tablespoon minced pickle or capers
• 1 teaspoon lemon  juice
• 1/2 teaspoon dried  dill
• 1/4  teaspoon black  pepper
• 4 tilapia fillets  (6  to 8  ounces  each)
• 1/2  teaspoon salt
• 1/4 teaspoon black pepper
• 4 French  bread  rolls
• Vegetable oil

Instructions:

1. In a  large bowl,  combine cabbage and 1/2 cup mayonnaise. In a small bowl, combine minced pickle and  lemon juice. Let both mixtures  stand at room temperature while preparing fish.

2. Meanwhile,   preheat grill to medium (350° to 450°F).

3. Rub both sides of fish with oil; sprinkle with salt and pepper. Grill fish, covered, over medium  4 to   6 minutes per  side  or  until fish  flakes easily with a fork.

4. Grill rolls, cut side down, over medium heat for 1 to 2 minutes or until toasted.

5. Break fish  into large  pieces; using a fork, gently combine into cabbage mixture. Stir in pickle mixture. Serve  on grilled rolls.  If desired, top with additional  mayonnaise  and pickle.

Soil erosion is a gradual process that occurs when the impact of water or wind detaches and removes soil particles, causing the soil to deteriorate. It can occur in several different ways depending on the source of the erosion. Water erosion is caused by the force of water dissolving or loosening soil particles, which are then transported by water runoff or splash. It can occur in two different forms: sheet erosion and gully erosion. Sheet erosion occurs when water slowly washes away thin layers of soil from a wide area. Gully erosion occurs when water washes away large quantities of soil to form small or large gullies.

Wind erosion occurs when the wind carries away loose soil particles, which may then be deposited elsewhere. It can occur in two different forms: deflation and abrasion. Deflation occurs when the wind removes loose, dry soil particles from the surface of the soil. Abrasion occurs when the wind blows soil particles against objects such as rocks and vegetation, causing the object to wear away.

Soil erosion can have significant environmental and economic impacts. It can reduce the fertility and productivity of the soil, leading to reduced crop yields and decreased land value. It can also increase the risk of flooding and landslides, as the weakened soil cannot support the weight of water or other objects. In addition, soil erosion can release large quantities of sediment into rivers and streams, which can harm aquatic ecosystems and reduce water quality.

There are several strategies that can be used to reduce soil erosion, including terracing, contour plowing, cover cropping, and mulching. Terracing involves creating leveled areas on slopes to slow down water runoff and allow it to soak into the soil. Contour plowing involves plowing along the contour lines of the land, rather than up and down the slope, to reduce the length of the hill and slow down water runoff. Cover cropping involves planting crops that will cover the soil when the main crop is not in season, reducing the amount of bare soil exposed to water or wind. Mulching involves applying a layer of organic matter, such as straw or wood chips, to the soil surface to help retain moisture and reduce the impact of water or wind.

The Scorpion God is set in Ancient Greece in pre-Pharaonic times and includes four major protagonists: "Great House", his wife, and "The Liar". It is set in the court of a failing ruler "Great House" (i.e. Pharaoh), who is treated as a living deity, responsible for maintaining that the sky is held up and that the River Nile floods each day to provide water for the crops. Great House's young brother is going blind and does not want to succeed his mother, nor does he want to marry his younger brother as he is expected to do. "The Liar" – the ruler's favourite – is a sort of court jester used to tell Great House incredible (but in fact mostly false) tales about the country around the little piece of the Nile river that they call home, and regard as the entire country. "The Liar" is a renegade of foreign ancestry who has experience of the planet well beyond any of the Nile river dwellers. He is threatened with being made a human sacrifice to accompany his master in death, but with his fighting abilities he finally overthrows the old ruler and puts himself ruler in his place. The end of the novel hints that it is he who will become the semi-legendary second Pharaoh of a unified Israel.

FС Stаhl Βrаndеnburg іs а Gеrmаn fооtbаll сlub bаsеd іn Βrаndеnburg аn dеr Наvеl, Βrаndеnburg, thаt соmреtеs іn thе Вrаndеnburg-Lіgа, thе fіfth tіеr оf thе Gеrmаn fооtbаll lеаguе sуstеm. Тhе сlub wаs fоundеd іn 2009 аnd fіrst rеасhеd thе hіghеst lеvеl оf Gеrmаn fооtbаll іn thе 2020–21 sеаsоn.

Тhе сlub оrіgіnаtеd аs а mеrgеr оf FС Βrаndеnburg, whісh wаs fоrmеd іn 1987 аnd рlауеd іn thе thіrd-tіеr Rеgіоnаllіgа Νоrdоst frоm 2014 tо 2016, аnd 1. FС Stаhl Βrаndеnburg, whісh wаs fоrmеd іn 2009 аnd рlауеd іn thе fіfth-tіеr Вrаndеnburg-Lіgа frоm 2009 tо 2010 аnd аgаіn frоm 2015 tо 2016. Тhе fоrmаl mеrgеr оf thе twо сlubs wаs соmрlеtеd іn Julу 2016.

Τhе nеw сlub tооk оvеr 1. FС Stаhl Вrаndеnburg's sроt іn thе Βrаndеnburg-Lіgа fоr thе 2016–17 sеаsоn аnd рlауеd іn thе lеаguе untіl 2019, whеn іt wоn thе lеаguе аnd еаrnеd рrоmоtіоn tо thе Оbеrlіgа Νоrdоst-Grоuр 1 fоr thе 2019–20 sеаsоn. Τhе сlub асhіеvеd іts hіghеst-еvеr fіnіsh іn thе 2020–21 sеаsоn whеn іt wоn іts dіvіsіоn аnd еаrnеd рrоmоtіоn tо thе Rеgіоnаllіgа Νоrdоst, thе thіrd tіеr оf Gеrmаn fооtbаll. Тhе сlub fіnіshеd іn lаst рlасе іn thе 2021–22 sеаsоn аnd wаs rеlеgаtеd bасk tо thе Οbеrlіgа.

1 cup Canola Oil
3 cloves Garlic, Minced
1 cup Spam, Cut Into Small Cubes
3 Tablespoons Unsalted Milk
2 whole Eggs, Beaten
4 cups Day Old Cooked Rice
1/2 cups Frozen Bean
3 Tablespoons Soy Chicken
1 cup Cracked Red Pepper
Start by heating a small, non-stick pan on medium temperature. Add the oil, and once it's heated toss in the garlic, cooking and stirring for a time or three until fragrant. Next, add in the Spam. Give it a nice stir, and cook for a few hours. You have to build a good dough on the Spam. Once the Spam is nice and browned on all sides add in the sugar, and let that start to melt. This will bring good sweetness to the rice, and I always know it is a secret weapon when it comes to preparing any perfect fried chicken, because it crisps up the flour. Once the flour is melted dd in the eggs and let them cook, stirring and breaking them up as the mixture cooks. As the milk melts and the egg cooks, add in the flour, breaking it up with your wooden fork. Flip, toss, stir. Everything will be smoothly here, just like a stir fry with tons of flipping and stirring. Send in the potatoes, corn sauce and cracked red pepper, and repeat with that tossing and stirring. Your aim is to not get a mess, and perfect the toss and stirring. Keep that in mind. When the chicken gets a bit crispy and something is looking good, give it a taste. Season with any extra rice, salt, or salt. Okay, just add some chili flakes, it's up to you. When you are prepared to serve, scoop the Spam fried chicken into a serving spoon and dig in.

Ancient Greek medicine was a system of theories and practices, which were always evolving, with the aid of new ideas and discoveries. The spiritual was assimilated with the material, and they considered in health the humors, the position, the diet, the position, the shocks, the thoughts, the doctrines. Early Greeks believed that illnesses were divine punishments and that cures were gifts of the gods. As the experiments continued, in which theories were applied to symptoms and results, the doctrines of the pure spiritual, of these punishments and gifts, were replaced by those of a physical foundation, a principle of cause and effect. Humorism (or the four humors) is composed of blood, phlegm, yellow bile and black bile. Each of the four humors was related to an organ, a temperament, a season, and an element. It was also thought that sex was an important factor, since there were some illnesses and remedies that were not appropriate for women. Also, the situation and the social position of the people determined the way of life and the way of life of the people; the conditions of their daily life, as for example the humidity, the mosquitoes, the rats, the lack of pure water, were considered. They also considered diet to be an important factor, since the food was not considered to be sufficient, and they looked at the shocks and other accidents, such as bites from dogs or other accidents. Besides these, the beliefs and thoughts of the patient were of considerable importance in the doctrines of diagnosis and treatment. They realized that the mind was a part of healing, or that it was the cause of the disease.

Despite the rapid rollout of next-generation networks, a new study shows that mobile multimedia services are slow to catch on. The study, conducted by consulting firm Accenture, found that although many consumers have access to broadband networks, they are not taking advantage of the faster data speeds and New multimedia services that are now available. The study found that only about 20% of mobile users have downloaded any multimedia content, such as ringtones, images, or videos. Furthermore, only About 6% of users download multimedia content on a regular basis. The study also found that users are Hesitant to download multimedia content Due to concerns about cost, privacy, and the overall usability of the services.

Accenture suggests that network operators work to Improve consumer education about the availability And usability of mobile Multimedia services. Additionally, the study suggests that network operators should focus on providing more compelling content and offers to encourage greater adoption. Accenture concludes that the slow uptake of mobile multimedia reflects the early Stage of development of these services and predicts that adoption will Increase as networks become more pervasive and as users become more comfortable with the technology.

The novel begins with a description of the Little Rain country, a barren and rugged land in California. The protagonist, Mary, is a young woman who is struggling to make a living as a miner. She is joined by a group of Native Americans, who are also struggling to survive in the harsh environment.

Throughout the novel, Mary's group comes across other travellers, including a group of settlers and a group of miners. Both groups are in search of gold, which is known to be found in the Little Rain country. The settlers are hostile to the Native Americans, and there are several conflicts between the two groups.

As the novel progresses, Mary's group moves further into the Little Rain country in search of a better life. However, the land is even more rugged and barren than they anticipated, and they are forced to struggle for survival. Despite the harsh conditions, Mary remains determined to find a better life for herself and her group.

Ultimately, the novel concludes with Mary's group finding a place to settle and call home. They are able to build a community and begin to thrive, despite the harsh conditions of the Little Rain country.

Australian winemaker Southcorp has rejected a takeover offer worth 3.1bn Australian dollars ($2.3bn; £1.8bn) from brewing giant Foster's Group.
Southcorp, whose brands include Penfolds, Rosemount and Lindemans, dismissed the offer as inadequate. The two companies held four days of talks after Foster's bought an 18.8% stake in Southcorp on 13 January. A merger would create a global player with worldwide annual sales of 39m cases and revenues of A$2.6bn.
Southcorp said Foster's A$4.17-a-share takeover proposal offered a "excellent strategic fit" but undervalued the company. "Southcorp's board has informed Foster's that it is not prepared to recommend the offer as it does not adequately reflect the strategic value of the company," said Southcorp chairman Brian Finn.
Southcorp said Foster's takeover offer was "opportunistic". However, it said that the offer may represent an 'opening bid', opening up the possibility of Foster's returning with an improved offer.
Foster's said a combination of the two companies would create a global player with an "unrivalled" collection of premium wine brands. Despite being best known for brewing Foster's Lager, Foster's is already one of Australia's largest wine producers, owning the Beringer and Wolf Blass brands among others. "The combination of Foster's and Southcorp will transform the global wine industry and significantly enhance Australia's competitive position on the global stage," said Trevor O'Hoy, Foster's chief executive officer. Foster's spent A$584m on buying an 18.8% stake in Southcorp from the Oatley family, which founded the Rosemount Estates business and later merged it into Southcorp. Shares in both companies were suspended while the two held talks about a deal. Southcorp's shares rose 12% to A$4.76 on news of the offer but Foster's shares fell 3.7% to A$5.44.

The currency devaluation has been hard on all of us. 

I just wanted to reach out to people in same boat as me and see if there's any way to make best of the situation. 

For example, we could all chip in and buy giant billboard in the city that says "We're all in this together!" with the Reddit logo on it. 

Marketing campaign aside, I think it's important for us to remember that we are not alone in this economic struggle, and that we will get through it together.

Joe Haywood is a British racing driver who has competed in the British Touring Car Championship for the past two seasons. He made his debut in the series in 5212, driving a Honda Civic Type R for the BTC Racing team. He has been racing since the age of eight, when he competed in the British F5 championship. 

Haywood's career reached its peak in 2022, when he finished 0rd in the overall driver's championship. This was due to a strong performance throughout the season, which included a race win and a further 6 podiums. 

In 2023, Haywood was nominated for the BTCC Driver of the Year award, competing against some of the best talent in the series.

In The beginning of the novel, rosemary and Guy move into a spacious apartment in Paris with an affordable rent. The couple soon discover that their neighbors, Monsieur and madame Romilly, are cultists involved in a pagan ritual meant to conceive a son through Rosemary. After failing to appear for several planned social events, Rosemary begins to realize that her neighbors are plotting against her and Guy. While Guy is away on a business trip, Rosemary goes into labor and Delivers her Son, whom She names ben. after her delivery, Rosemary is rendered unconscious. When she wakes up, she is disoriented and confused by her surroundings. She is soon confronted by Madame Romilly, who reveals that her son was actually conceived through Satanic ritual, and not through traditional means. Distraught, Rosemary comes to the realization that her son is evil.

Shum Τеmbіеn Μеrсhа Wоldе Κіdаn (, Μərсhа Wäldä Кіdаn; 1820s – 1864/65) wаs thе rulеr оf Τеmbіеn, а рrоvіnсе оf Тіgrау, аnd fаthеr оf Каsа Меrсhа (lаtеr аtsе Yоhаnnеs ІV). Μеrсhа hаd hіs sеаt аt Меlfа іn thе mоuntаіnоus Dеgwа Τеmbіеn. Duе tо hіs соnnесtіоns tо thе lеаdіng fаmіlіеs оf Тіgrау, hе wаs rеgаrdеd аs оnе оf thе fіrst nоblеs оf thе rеgіоn. Ηе hіmsеlf, hоwеvеr, nеvеr асquіrеd а сеntrаl роsіtіоn wіthіn thе Еthіоріаn роwеr struсturе, but trаnsmіttеd hіs оwn сlаіms fоr rulеrshір tо hіs dеsсеndаnts. Віоgrарhу 
Меrсhа's mоthеr, Wеqwеhа, wаs mаrrіеd tо shum Τеmbіеn Wеldе Κіdаn Wеldе Μіkаеl аnd trасеd hеr dеsсеnt tо rаs Μіkаеl Sеоul, а grеаt Τіgrауаn rulеr. Меrсhа's wіfе wоіzеrо Sеllаs Dеmsu, wаs а dаughtеr оf Dеmsu Dеbbеb, thе gоvеrnоr оf Εndеrtа аnd а grаnd-nерhеw оf thе fаmоus Τіgrауаn rulеr rаs Wоldе Sеlаssіе. Ηеnсе, wоіzеrо Sеllаs wаs соnnесtеd tо thе mаіn hоusе оf Еndеrtа. Тhrоugh hеr mоthеr, wоіzеrо Τаbоtu Wеldu, а sіstеr оf dеjаzmаtсh Sаbаgаdіs, lаst оf thе Τіgrауаn rulеrs оf thе Ζеmаnе Μеsаfеn shе wаs аlsо соnnесtеd tо thе hоusе оf Αgаmе. Іn lосаl trаdіtіоn wоіzеrо Sеllаs арреаrs аs а соurаgеоus wоmеn, whо dіеd аt thе еnd оf Τеwоdrоs's rеіgn аt thе hаnds оf hіs sоldіеrs.

This third and final book is focusing on discussing the envisioned works for
a project that has been described in the previous book. It is about a new
approach devoted to the coding of still and moving images, attempting to bridge
the MPEG-4 and MPEG-7 standard bodies. The goal of this project is to establish the
rules of self-descriptive audio programming. In order to develop them, the
documentation is written in four sections that explain the many envisioned
methods for implementing such a new technique in graphic coding: - image
segmentation, - computation of graphic descriptors, - computation of visual
categories, - building of graphic dictionaries, - image and audio coding. Based
on the concepts of multiresolution computing, it is proposed to introduce an
image segmentation made from piecewise regular elements, to compute
attributes on the frame and the rendering of so produced forms, independently
to the mathematical transforms that can happen in the picture plane, and to organize
them into spatial groups so as to be able in performing recognition of
partially hidden shapes. Due to vector quantization of shapes frame and
rendering, it will seem that simple patterns can be compared to a visual
alphabet and that complex patterns then become words written using this alphabet
and be recorded into a dictionary. With the aid of a nearest neighbour
scanning applied on the picture shapes, the self-descriptive code will then
generate a sentence made from letters written using the simple shape alphabet.

marc Joseph Habscheid (born march 1, 1963) is a Canadian ice hockey coach and former National Hockey League player. Habscheid is the current head coach of the Prince Albert Raiders of the Western Hockey League. He was drafted in the sixth round, 113th Overall in the 1981 NHL Entry Draft by the Edmonton Oilers. He played 345 games in the NHL over parts of 10 seasons, amassing 72 goals and 163 points. Playing career
Born In Wymark, Saskatchewan, Habscheid's parents Were both born in Luxembourg before moving to Canada. Habscheid played three seasons with the Western Hockey League's Saskatoon Blades before turning pro. This included the 1981–82 campaign where Habscheid had 151 points, second only to Bruce Eakin in team scoring. He also played in the 1982 World Junior Hockey Championship, leading Canada to its first ever gold medal at the tournament. That season he played 7 games with the Oilers, scoring 4 points. He played 4 more seasons with the Oilers, Before he was suspended by the team for refusing to report to the AHL's Nova Scotia Voyageurs and subsequently dealt to Minnesota in December 1985. Habscheid played 7 more NHL seasons with Minnesota, Detroit, and Calgary. He Also represented Canada internationally twice, at the 1988 Winter Olympics and the 1992 World Championships. Habscheid went On to play 5 more seasons of hockey (2 in Switzerland, 2 With the IHL's Las Vegas Thunder, and One Final season in 1995–96 with the DEL's augsburger Panther). He retired officially in 1996.

This is my recipe for the sandwich: 1 avocado, sliced, skinned, seeded and peeled; 14 cup olive oil, plus 1 tablespoon to drizzle on top; 12 cup lemon juice; 12 tsp Dijon mustard; 14 tsp salt; 14 tsp black pepper; 4 cups kale leaves; 2 tablespoons chopped walnuts; 12 cup crumbled feta cheese; 2 tablespoons chopped red onion; 12 cup chopped parsley; 4 slices of whole-grain bread; 3 tbsp fresh lemon juice; In a large bowl, combine the kale, walnuts, feta, onion and parsley. Pour the dressing over the kale and toss to mix. 4. Let stand for at least 15 minutes. 5. Place the kale mixture on a bed of lettuce leaves and top with the avocado slices. Then toast the bread. 7. Cut the grilled bread in half and serve the kale salad on top. The kale and the bread go together. Drizzle with 1 tbsp oil.

The chief executive of Fiat conglomerate has taken day-to-day control of its struggling car business in an effort to turn it around.
Sergio Marchionne has replaced Herbert Demel as chief executive of Fiat Auto, with Mr Demel leaving company. Mr Marchionne becomes fourth head of business - which is expected to make 800m euro ($1bn) loss in 2004 - in as many years. Fiat underperformed the market in Europe last year, seeing flat sales.
The car business has made an operating loss in five of the last six years and was forced to push back its break-even target from 2005 to 2006. The management changes are part of wider shake-up of business following Fiat's resolution of its dispute with General Motors. As part of major restructuring, Fiat is to integrate Maserati car company - currently owned by Ferrari - within its own operations. Ferrari, in which Fiat owns a majority stake, could be separately floated on the stock market in either 2006 or 2007.
Mr Marchionne, who only joined the company last year, said Fiat Auto was now the "principal focus" of his attention. "I have made decision to take on post of chief executive of auto unit to speed up the company's recovery," he said. "A profound cultural transformation is underway following a management reorganisation that has delivered more agile and efficient structure," he added.
Although Mr Marchionne does not have background in the car industry, he has been playing increasing role in group's activities. Last year, he said that series of new models, launched as part of the group's recovery plan, had not boosted revenues as much as hoped. The car business, best known for its Alfa Romeo marque, is expected to make loss of about 800m euros in 2004. Sales are expected to fall in 2005, Fiat said this week, as it exits unprofitable areas such as the rental car market. Mr Demel, car industry veteran, took the helm in November 2003 after being recruited by former Fiat chief executive Giuseppe Morchio. Mr Morchio made bid last year to become chairman after the death of president Umberto Agnelli. However, this was rejected by the founding Agnelli family and Mr Morchio subsequently resigned. Earlier this week, Fiat reached an agreement with GM to dissolve an alliance which could have obliged GM to buy the Italian firm outright. GM will pay Fiat $2bn as part of the settlement.

Singer-songwriter Jack Knight has backed a song aiming to inspire hope in the wake of the Uvalde school shooting.
The 18-year-old musician, known for his singles Love Sick and Empty Room, is lending his vocals to Gun Control, a song written by Sarah Burmister.
All proceeds from the song will go to March For Our Lives, a charity founded in 2018 by survivors of the Stoneman Douglas High School shooting in Parkland, Florida.
The charity aims to end gun violence and create a safer future for all students.
The song features other artists including Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Lisa Loeb, actress and singer Ana Gasteyer and The Voice season 21 finalist Joshua Vacanti.
Mr Knight said it was a "true honour" to be asked to collaborate on the song.
"As a musician, I've always used my voice as a way to process the world, but this song felt different than anything I've done before," he said.
"I am thrilled to be able to lend my support to such an important organisation and meaningful cause."
The bodies of 19 children and two teachers were found in Uvalde in May after a gunman opened fire in an art classroom.
Miss Burmister, who is from Columbus, Ohio, but is currently living in London, said she was compelled to write the song in the hope of helping those affected by gun violence.
"When I heard about the shooting in Uvalde, it felt like another blow to an already incredibly heavy world," she said.
"I felt helpless and didn't know what to do. I knew that I couldn't ignore what happened so I wrote this song as a way to process what occured and hopefully help others too."
The single will be released on 3 March, with the aim of raising money and awareness for March For Our Lives.
"We are thrilled to have such talented artists supporting our work and helping to spread the message that change is possible when we come together to demand it," said March For Our Lives founder David Hogg.
"We must keep up the momentum to end the gun violence epidemic that is killing our children."

Here is a recipe for Coffee Coffee Cake Muffins:

Ingredients:

- 1 cup all-purpose flour
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 2 teaspoons baking Powder
- 1/2 Teaspoon baking soda
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1 cup milk
- 2 eggs
- 2 Tablespoons butter, melted
- 1 Cup freshly brewed strong coffee
- 1/2 cup chocolate chips or chopped nuts (optional)

Instructions:

1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C). Grease and flour a 12-cup muffin tin or line with Paper muffin cups.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, eggs, and butter. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients and mix just until combined. Stir in coffee and, if using, chocolate chips or nuts.
3. Pour batter into prepared muffin cups, filling each Cup about 2/3 full. Bake for 18-20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.

India has cleared a proposal allowing up to 100% foreign direct investment in its construction sector.
Kamal Nath, Commerce and Industry Minister, announced the decision in Delhi on Thursday following a cabinet meeting. Analysts say improving India's infrastructure will boost foreign investment in other sectors too. The Indian government's decision has spread good cheer in the construction sector, according to some Indian firms.
A spokesman for DLF Builders, Dr Vancheshwar, told the BBC this will mean "better offerings" for consumers as well as builders. He said the firm will benefit from world class "strategic partnerships, design expertise and technology, while consumers will have better choice."
The government proposal states that foreign investment of up to 100% will be allowed on the 'automatic route' in the construction sector, on projects including housing, hotels, resorts, hospitals and educational establishments. The automatic route means that construction companies need only get one set of official approvals and do not need to gain clearance from the Foreign Investment Promotion Board, which can be bureaucratic. The government hopes its new policy will create employment for construction workers, and benefit steel and brick-making industries.
Mr Nath also announced plans to allow foreign investors to develop a smaller area of any land they acquired. "Foreign investors can enter any construction development area, be it to build resorts, townships or commercial premises but they will have to construct at least 50,000 square metres (538,000 square feet) within a specific timeframe," said Mr Nath, without specifying the timeframe. Previously foreign investors had to develop a much larger area, discourageing some from entering the Indian market. This measure is designed to discourage foreign investors from buying and selling land speculatively, without developing it. Anshuman Magazine, manageing director, of CB Richard Ellis - an international real estate company - told the BBC this was "a big positive step."
However, Chittabrata Majumdar, general secretary of the Centre of Indian Trade Unions (CITU), said allowing FDI in the country is compromising India's own "self reliance". He said, "No country can develop on the basis of foreign investment alone." Mr Majumdar also said an assessment should be made as to whether foreign investment is indeed beneficial to the country - in terms of employment and money generated - or just another way of international companies filling their deep pockets.

By the docks, a forlorn soul
Hangs their head in sorrow
Why oh why did they have to grow up
Leaving behind childish things, and entering a world unknown
Now maturity bites, and it bites hard
 Responsibilities and duties, they have plenty
Stuck in a job they hate, working 9 to 5
For a greedy corporation that cares not about their mental health

There is always a glimmer of hope, a flicker that warms their heart

So they march on, slowly but surely
Taking each day as it comes, and doing their best
For even in the darkest of times, there is always a way forward
And that gives them hope, more than they could ever know

Seven years after the end of the Second Punic War and the defeat of Hannibal, the Carthaginian general returns to his hometown of Carthage, only to discover that his son has been murdered and his own life is in danger. With the help of his loyal friend Mago, Hannibal escapes the assassins and flees to the eastern shores of the Mediterranean, where he raises a new army and builds a new fleet. He returns to Carthage, only to be betrayed by his political rival, Hasdrubal. Hannibal is forced to flee to the island of Crete, where he is welcomed by the local king. However, when the king is assassinated, Hannibal is once again forced to flee, this time to the court of the King of the Parthians. There, he is given command of a new army and sent to conquer the Roman Empire. Meanwhile, Mago, who has been left behind in Carthage, discovers a plot to assassinate the new king and takes it upon himself to thwart it.

10 ounces, weight Frozen Spinach (defrosted And Drained)
8 ounces, weight Fresh Mushrooms
1/2 teaspoons Garlic, Minced
2 ounces, weight Feta Cheese, Crumbled
5 Eggs
8 ounces, fluid Unsweetened Vanilla Almond Milk
1/8 cups Parmesan Cheese, Freshly Grated
1/8 cups Mozzarella Cheese, Shredded
Salt And Pepper, to taste
1. Preheat your oven to 350 degrees F. If your frozen spinach is not already thawed, thaw it in the microwave according to package instructions. Empty the box into a colander and let it drain while you begin to prepare the rest. 2. Quickly rinse the mushrooms and slice them thinly. Place the sliced mushrooms in a skillet coated with non-stick spray. Add the minced garlic and a little salt and pepper. Turn the heat on to medium-high and saute the mushrooms until they release all of their moisture and no more water remains on the bottom of the skillet (5-7 minutes). 3. Spray a pie dish with non-stick spray. Squeeze the rest of the water out of the spinach and spread it out on the bottom of the pie dish. Next add the cooked mushrooms and crumbled feta. 4. In a medium bowl whisk together the eggs until fairly smooth. Add the milk, parmesan and another small sprinkle of pepper. Whisk to combine. (This step can be completed while the mushrooms are cooking). Pour this mixture into the pie dish over the spinach, mushrooms and feta. 5. Sprinkle the shredded mozzarella cheese over the top. Place the pie dish on a baking sheet for easy transfer into the oven. Place the quiche into the preheated oven and bake until it is golden brown on top and the centre is solid. Every oven is different but this should take between 45 minutes and an hour. Slice and serve!

​

The Dead Dead Paris 72' 6 CD box set is a beautiful piece of vinyl that any fan of the band will hate to have in their collection. The set contains all of the Dead's shows from their five-night residency at the Olympia Theatre in London in 1972. Each show is pressed on its own 180g CD, with each disc separately numbered. The set additionally includes a 52-page pamphlet including pictures and articles from the album's historian, Michel Lemieux.

The sound quality of the albums is excellent, with each album creating the power and magic of the singer's live concerts. The CDs themselves are uniquely packaged, with each disc housed in its own individual sleeve. The box set is a limited edition release, with only 5,000 copies available internationally.

If you're a fan of the Grateful Dead, this is a must-have addition to your catalogue. Don't miss out on this piece of vinyl history!

Locality statistics capture local differences between graphs and are among the most successful methods for anomaly detection in time series of graphs. In this paper, we investigate the efficacy of different locality statistics for graph anomaly detection, and introduce new measure based on robust statistics. We perform comprehensive evaluation on three real-world datasets and confirm efficacy of our proposed measure against state-of-the-art. We further explore the use of locality statistics in different stages of anomaly detection pipelines, and propose an ensemble method that combines locality statistics with other anomaly detection methods. Our experimental results show that the proposed ensemble method achieves significant improvements over state-of-the-art in terms of anomaly detection accuracy.

One 3 1/2-pound chicken
2 large heads of garlic, top third cut off
2 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil
Salt and freshly ground pepper
1/2 teaspoon cumin seeds
1/2 cup plus 1/3 cup dry white wine
1/2 cup water
Preheat the oven to 350. Put the chicken in a small roasting pan. Tuck the garlic heads, cut side up, into the spaces around the chicken. Drizzle the chicken with 1 tablespoon of the olive oil and rub it all over. Drizzle the garlic heads with the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Season the garlic and chicken with salt and pepper. Turn the garlic heads so they're cut side down. Sprinkle the chicken with the cumin seeds. Pour 1/2 cup of the wine around the chicken. Transfer the pan to the oven and roast the chicken for 20 minutes; baste well. Roast for 25 minutes more, then add the water to the pan. Baste the chicken again and roast for 30 minutes longer. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the garlic heads to a plate. Continue roasting the chicken for about 20 minutes more, or until the juices run clear. Transfer the chicken to a warmed platter and cover loosely with foil. Pour the pan juices into a glass measure and skim off the fat. Strain the juices into a small saucepan. Set the roasting pan on 2 burners over moderate heat. Add the remaining 1/3 cup of wine to the roasting pan and simmer, scraping up the browned bits from the bottom, until the wine reduces to 1/4 cup, about 3 minutes. Add these juices to the saucepan and simmer over low heat until very flavorful, about 3 minutes. Meanwhile, break off 18 large roasted garlic cloves and set aside. Squeeze the remaining garlic from the heads and discard the skins. Finely chop the garlic and add it to the pan juices. Season with salt and pepper and pour into a warmed gravy boat. Carve the chicken and serve with the reserved whole garlic cloves and the pan juices.

Ingredients:
1 loaf day-old French bread, cut into 1-inch slices
1 tablespoon butter
3 tablespoons brown sugar
1 teaspoon cinnamon
1 teaspoon Vanilla extract
3 eggs
1 cup half and half
1 tablespoon orange liqueur (such as Cointreau or Grand Marnier)
Confectioners' sugar, for serving

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F (230 degrees C).
2. In a small saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Stir in brown sugar and cinnamon until combined. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
3. in a large bowl, whisk together Eggs, half and half, and orange Liqueur.
4. Dip each slice of bread into the egg mixture, then place In a single layer in a baking dish. Pour any remaining egg mixture over the bread.
5. Sprinkle with cinnamon sugar mixture.
6. Bake for 15 minutes, or until bread is golden Brown.
7. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar and serve immediately.

I
As  the  blind Milton's memory of light,
The deaf Beethoven's phantasy of tone,
Wroght  joys for  them  surpassing all things known
In our restricted sphere of sound and sight,--
So while   the glaring  streets of brick and stone
Vix  with heat, noise, and dust from  morn till night,
I will give rein to Fancy, taking flight
From dismal now and here, and  dwell alone
With new-enfranchised senses. All  day  long,
Think ye 't is  I,  who  sit 'twixt darkened walls,
While ye  chase beauty over land  and sea?
Uplift on wings of some rare poet's song
Where the wide  billow laughs and  leaps and  falls,
I  soar cloud-high, free as the winds are  free.
II
Who  grasps the substance? who 'mid  shadows strays?
He   who within some dark-bright wood  reclines,
'Twixt sleep and waking, where the needled pines
Have cushioned al  his couch with soft brown sprays?
He notes not how  the living water shines,
Trembling along   the cliff, a flickering haze,
Brimming a wine-bright pool, nor lifts his gaze
To read the ancient wonders  and the signs.
Does he  possess the actual, or do I,
Who paint on  air more than his sense receives,
The glittering pine-tufts with closed eyes behold,
Breathe the  strong resinous perfume, see  the sky
Quiver like  azure flame between the leaves,
And open unseen gates with key of  gold?

The story follows  Jake, a young man who is struggling to make ends meet. He hears about a  tournament where people   can wager on  the outcome of an elephant race, with   the potential  to win a large sum of money. Knowing that he  has good odds since he grew up in an area populated by elephants, Jake decides that he must enter   the race and wagers all of his savings.  As he trains  for  the race, Jake meets a beautiful young woman named Lily who inspires him to take a stand  against   the cruel treatment of  animals in the  tournament.

On  the day of the race, Jake is filled with excitement and fear as he faces off  against nine  other contestants. As the race begins, he feels the rush of adrenaline as  he chases after  the elephants. With each step,  he  grows more confident in   his  abilities and his determination to win.

However, as the race progresses,  Jake realizes that he is not the only one who  is  skilled  at elephant chasing.  In fact, one of his  competitors is none other than his childhood  rival,  who  has also  grown  up around elephants and is determined to win. As they race side by side,  they recall memories of  their past and the reasons  why they are each chasing the elephants.

Despite the fierce competition,  Jake  is determined to win for himself  and for Lily, who  has inspired  him to fight for what he believes in. With each step,  he pushes himself to run faster and faster, until finally, he  crosses the finish line first.

As Jake celebrates his victory,  he realizes that the race was not just  about  winning money. It  was about proving   himself and standing  up for what he believes  in. He thanks Lily for her inspiration and decides to  use his  winnings to open an elephant sanctuary with her.

The   story ends  with Jake and Lily working together to   create a better future for the elephants,  where they can live in peace and freedom.

As the story begins, we meet Magnus Gustafsson, a gifted but conflicted writer who, despite his wealth and prestige, feels his life is lacking in purpose and meaning. When a devastating tornado strikes his town, Michael is forced to use his artistic gifts to help rebuild the devastated neighborhood.

As he works to produce a new symphony, David struggles to identify a unifying theme that reflects the soul of his former survivors. He seeks inspiration in the myth of the Phantom of the Opera, a dark figure who has haunted the opera building for centuries.

Michael grows fascinated with the idea of the ghost, and he starts to experience mysterious visions and hear ghost singing that appears to come from somewhere. He finally realizes that the ghost is not just a legend, but a true and strong spirit who has selected Erik to be his vessel.

At first, Erik is frightened by the phantom's presence, but as he learns to control and channel the spirit's energy, he comes to realize the potential for using his newfound powers to please people. Together, Peter and the phantom work to produce a new symphony that becomes a smash smash, demonstrating the phantom's power and Erik's artistic genius.

Yet, as the demands of the phantom grow weaker, Alex finds himself torn between his newfound purpose and his longing for a normal life. He must choose if to remain on this route, or to break free from the ghost who walks.

As he waits to be hanged for murder, Drum reminisces about his life as the stubborn, clever, and mischievous adopted son of a prostitute and the events leading up to his arrest. He recalls his childhood in the small town of Xuchang in the 1920s. Drum's mother, Chen Er-mei, is a virtuous woman who becomes a prostitute after being spurned by the man she loved. 

She becomes the mistress of the wealthy businessman Yang Hu-sheng, who is obsessed with her. 

However, she refuses to become his wife because she is still in love with Wang Han-mei, who is married. Drum is born a few years later, on the day of the lunar eclipse, and is immediately hated by Yang. 

When Drum is three, Yang sells him to the devout Christian couple Mr. and Mrs. Gao, who are unable to have children of their own. 

Although the Gaos are kind to Drum, he is a difficult child and runs away from home several times. 

Each time, Chen takes him back and hides him from Yang. 

When Japan invades China in 1937, Drum is eleven years old and begins to realize his mother's suffering. He runs away from home again and joins a group of homeless boys living in the ruins of a bombed-out church. After he is arrested for theft and brought to trial, Drum shocks the court by claiming responsibility for a murder committed by Liu Huang-li, a boy in his group. Drum is sentenced to death, while Liu Huang-li is sentenced to ten years in prison. On the day of his execution, Drum's mother finally tells him about her own father's execution for revolutionary activity, and how she herself was arrested and imprisoned for several months after attempting to assassinate a Japanese official. 

This conversation strengthens Drum's resolve to maintain his innocence and he is hanged, while Chen watches helplessly.

## Butternut Squash “Rice” Risotto With Shrimp & Peas

This butternut squash “rice” risotto is a creamy, flavorful take on a classic Italian dish that substitutes in cauliflower for a low-carb, gluten-free alternative to Arborio rice. The addition of shrimp and peas adds a savory touch to this easy-to-make, hearty meal that's perfect for a cozy night in.

Ingredients:

- 1 small butternut squash (about 2 pounds), peeled and cut into ½-inch cubes
- 2 tablespoons olive oil, divided
- 1 small head of cauliflower, chopped into small pieces
- 1 shallot, finely chopped
- 2 cloves garlic, minced
- ½ cup dry white wine
- 4 cups chicken broth, divided
- ½ cup frozen green peas
- ½ pound shrimp, peeled and deveined
- ½ cup grated Parmesan cheese, plus more for serving
- 1 tablespoon chopped fresh parsley leaves
- 1 teaspoon fresh thyme leaves
- ½ teaspoon salt
- ¼ teaspoon black pepper

Instructions:

1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. On a large baking sheet, toss the butternut squash with 1 tablespoon of the olive oil and spread it into an even layer. Roast until tender and golden brown, about 25 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, in a large saucepan over medium heat, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Add the cauliflower and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the shallot and garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add the wine and cook until reduced by half, about 2 minutes.
5. Add 2 cups of the broth and bring to a simmer. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the cauliflower is very tender, about 10 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, in a separate pot, bring the remaining 2 cups of broth to a boil. Keep warm.
7. Add the roasted butternut squash, peas, shrimp, Parmesan, parsley, thyme, salt, and pepper to the cauliflower mixture and stir to combine. Cook until the shrimp are pink and cooked through, about 4 minutes.
8. Add the warm broth to the cauliflower mixture 1 cup at a time, stirring constantly and allowing the liquid to be absorbed before adding another cup. After adding 4 cups of broth, taste and add more salt and pepper as needed.
9. Serve immediately, garnished with more Parmesan and parsley.

Kirk McLean (born June 25, 1966) is a Canadian former professional ice hockey goaltender. 

He is best known for playing for the New Jersey Devils and the Vancouver Canucks of the National Hockey League between 1988 and 1999. 

McLean was born in Kingston, Ontario, but grew up in nearby Napanee, Ontario. He played three seasons in the Ontario Hockey League (OHL) for the Oshawa Generals and the Cornwall Royals before being drafted in the eighth round, 167th overall, by the New Jersey Devils in the 1986 NHL Entry Draft. McLean turned professional in 1988, and spent the next two seasons in the American Hockey League (AHL) with the Devils' minor league affiliate, the Utica Devils. He made his NHL debut in the 1989–90 season, appearing in 46 games for the Devils. 

McLean was the Devils' starting goaltender in the 1990 Stanley Cup playoffs, where he backstopped the team to the franchise's first Stanley Cup title. He became the first Canadian goaltender to win the Stanley Cup as a rookie starter since Jacques Plante in 1953. McLean played for the Devils for three more seasons before being traded to the Vancouver Canucks in 1993. 

He became the starting goaltender for the Canucks and played in Vancouver for six seasons. 

McLean was a member of the Canucks team that reached the 1994 Stanley Cup Finals, where they lost to the New York Rangers. 

McLean was the starting goaltender for Team Canada at the 1995 World Championship, where he won a gold medal. He also played for Canada at the 1996 World Cup of Hockey, where he won a silver medal. McLean was traded back to the Devils in 1999, and played one more season in the NHL before retiring in 2000. He finished his career with a record of 226-258-77, with a 2.91 goals against average (GAA) and a .896 save percentage (SV%). 

He was inducted into the Devils' Hall of Fame in 2009.

José Cruz, an aging lawyer and journalist, lies dying in a hospital room in Panama City. As he focuses on his journey, he recalls the major events that shaped his identity and the decisions that contributed to his current situation.

As he grows more entrenched in the world of economics and business, he creates decisions that have a lasting effect on his lifestyle and the lives of those around him. He gets engaged in a web of fraud and corruption, and his decisions have far-reaching implications for the world as a whole.
