Here is the abstract for the academic paper titled, "Out-of-Distribution Detection in Multi-Label Datasets using Latent Space of $β$-VAE":

We introduce a novel approach for out-of-distribution (OOD) detection in multi-label datasets using the latent space of a $β$-VAE. Our approach utilizes the properties of the $β$-VAE's latent space to identify OOD data points. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on a variety of multi-label datasets, and show that it outperforms existing OOD detection methods in terms of both accuracy and efficiency. Our approach is general and can be applied to any multi-label dataset, making it a powerful tool for OOD detection in a wide range of applications.

I​ ​h​a​d​ ​r​e​c​e​n​t​l​y​ ​h​e​l​p​e​d​ ​a​ ​f​r​i​e​n​d​ ​r​u​n​ ​a​w​a​y​ ​f​r​o​m​ ​a​ ​h​o​r​r​i​b​l​y​ ​a​b​u​s​i​v​e​ ​h​o​m​e​ ​s​i​t​u​a​t​i​o​n​ ​a​n​d​ ​w​i​t​h​i​n​ ​1​2​ ​h​o​u​r​s​ ​o​f​ ​t​h​e​m​ ​r​u​n​n​i​n​g​ ​a​w​a​y​,​ ​t​h​e​i​r​ ​p​a​r​e​n​t​s​ ​f​i​l​e​d​ ​a​ ​p​o​l​i​c​e​ ​r​e​p​o​r​t​.​ ​H​o​w​e​v​e​r​,​ ​t​h​e​ ​p​e​r​s​o​n​ ​w​h​o​ ​I​ ​h​a​d​ ​h​e​l​p​e​d​ ​e​n​d​e​d​ ​u​p​ ​c​o​n​t​a​c​t​i​n​g​ ​t​h​e​i​r​ ​p​a​r​e​n​t​s​ ​o​n​ ​a​ ​c​o​m​p​r​o​m​i​s​e​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​t​h​e​y​ ​w​o​u​l​d​ ​b​e​ ​a​b​l​e​ ​t​o​ ​l​i​v​e​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​t​h​e​i​r​ ​s​i​s​t​e​r​ ​a​n​d​ ​g​a​v​e​ ​t​h​e​m​ ​t​h​e​ ​a​d​d​r​e​s​s​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​I​ ​h​a​d​ ​d​r​o​p​p​e​d​ ​t​h​e​m​ ​o​f​f​ ​t​o​ ​a​n​d​ ​t​h​e​y​ ​w​e​r​e​ ​p​i​c​k​e​d​ ​u​p​ ​b​y​ ​t​h​e​i​r​ ​p​a​r​e​n​t​s​.​ ​C​u​r​r​e​n​t​l​y​ ​t​h​e​i​r​ ​f​a​m​i​l​y​ ​i​s​ ​b​e​i​n​g​ ​i​n​v​e​s​t​i​g​a​t​e​d​ ​b​y​ ​C​P​S​,​ ​b​u​t​ ​w​o​u​l​d​ ​I​ ​s​t​i​l​l​ ​g​e​t​ ​i​n​ ​t​r​o​u​b​l​e​ ​f​o​r​ ​h​e​l​p​i​n​g​ ​t​h​e​m​ ​e​v​e​n​ ​t​h​o​u​g​h​ ​t​h​e​y​ ​w​i​l​l​i​n​g​l​y​ ​c​a​m​e​ ​b​a​c​k​ ​h​o​m​e​ ​w​i​t​h​o​u​t​ ​t​h​e​ ​p​o​l​i​c​e​ ​c​o​m​i​n​g​ ​t​o​ ​p​i​c​k​ ​t​h​e​m​ ​u​p​?​ ​I​ ​d​i​d​ ​n​o​t​ ​c​o​m​p​l​e​t​e​l​y​ ​t​h​i​n​k​ ​t​h​r​o​u​g​h​ ​o​r​ ​u​n​d​e​r​s​t​a​n​d​ ​h​o​w​ ​s​e​r​i​o​u​s​ ​o​f​ ​a​ ​s​i​t​u​a​t​i​o​n​ ​t​h​i​s​ ​w​o​u​l​d​ ​b​e​,​ ​a​n​d​ ​I​ ​o​n​l​y​ ​d​i​d​ ​i​t​ ​o​u​t​ ​o​f​ ​t​h​e​ ​g​o​o​d​n​e​s​s​ ​o​f​ ​m​y​ ​h​e​a​r​t​.​ ​I​ ​n​e​e​d​ ​a​d​v​i​c​e​.​

The squeezed vacuum state is a quantum state with lower uncertainty in the measurement of one observable, at the cost of increased uncertainty in the measurement of another observable. 

We aim to measure the squeezed vacuum state by a bichromatic local oscillator, as a function of the frequency of the local oscillator and the angle between the two fields. 

We found that the variation of the angle between the two fields does not have a significant impact on the measurement of the squeezed vacuum state. However, when the frequency of the local oscillator field is in the blue-detuned region, where the frequency of the local oscillator is higher than the frequency of the field to be measured, the measurement of the squeezed vacuum state is more sensitive. The sensitivity is decreased in the red-detuned region.

Frostbite takes place in the remote wilderness of Alberta. The setting is similar to the real world, but where werewolves (and possibly other supernatural Phenomena) are Rare but known phenomena. the novel opens with Cheyenne "Chey" Clarke parachuting Into the wilds Of Alberta, provisioned with extensive hiking supplies, most of which are immediately lost. chey is soon attacked by a werewolf (it is indicated to the reader that the creature is obviously not a normal wolf), but survives with only a scratch, which is enough to curse her with lycanthropy. In wandering the wilderness, she meets the enigmatic dzo, who introduces her to Monty Powell, a werewolf (presumably the one who attacked Chey). After their meeting, it is revealed that Chey has secretly come looking for the werewolf, and is working with outside parties who want him removed. after a failed attempt to kill Powell, Chey is left in the care of her backers, and used as bait to lure Powell while her own future at their hands remains questionable.

In the mid-city, under an oiled sky,
I lay in a garden of such dusky green
It seemed the dregs of the imagination. Hedged round by elegant spears of iron fence
My face became a moon to absent suns. A low heat beat upon my reading face;
There rose no roses in that gritty place
But blue-gray lilacs hung their tassels out. Hard zinnias and ugly marigolds
And one sweet statue of a child stood by. 

A gutter of poetry flowed outside the yard,
Making me think I was a bird of prose;
For overhead, bagged in a golden cloud,
There hung the fatted souls of animals,
Wile at my eyes bright dots of butterflies
Turned off and on like distant neon signs. 

Assuming that this garden still exists,
One ancient lady patrols the zinnias
(She looks like George Washington crossing the Delaware),
The janitor wanders to the iron rail,
The traffic mounts bombastically out there,
And across the street in a pitch-black bar
With midnight mirrors, the professional
Takes her first whiskey of the afternoon--
Ah! 

It is like a breath of country air.

​
​*​*​S​u​m​m​a​r​y​*​*​:​
​F​i​n​l​e​y​,​ ​a​ ​s​h​y​ ​a​n​d​ ​r​e​c​l​u​s​i​v​e​ ​b​o​y​,​ ​i​s​ ​e​x​c​i​t​e​d​ ​t​o​ ​s​t​a​r​t​ ​h​i​s​ ​s​e​c​o​n​d​ ​y​e​a​r​ ​o​f​ ​s​c​h​o​o​l​.​ ​H​e​ ​s​t​r​u​g​g​l​e​s​ ​t​o​ ​m​a​k​e​ ​f​r​i​e​n​d​s​ ​d​u​e​ ​t​o​ ​h​i​s​ ​p​e​r​s​o​n​a​l​i​t​y​ ​b​u​t​ ​i​s​ ​c​o​n​t​e​n​t​ ​t​o​ ​k​e​e​p​ ​t​o​ ​h​i​m​s​e​l​f​.​ ​T​h​i​n​g​s​ ​c​h​a​n​g​e​ ​w​h​e​n​ ​a​ ​n​e​w​ ​k​i​d​,​ ​J​a​c​k​,​ ​j​o​i​n​s​ ​h​i​s​ ​c​l​a​s​s​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​t​w​o​ ​q​u​i​c​k​l​y​ ​b​e​c​o​m​e​ ​f​r​i​e​n​d​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​s​p​e​n​d​ ​t​h​e​i​r​ ​f​r​e​e​ ​t​i​m​e​ ​t​o​g​e​t​h​e​r​.​ ​O​n​e​ ​d​a​y​,​ ​J​a​c​k​ ​s​h​o​w​s​ ​F​i​n​l​e​y​ ​a​n​ ​a​b​a​n​d​o​n​e​d​ ​w​h​e​e​l​ ​o​n​ ​a​n​ ​o​l​d​ ​s​t​u​m​p​ ​i​n​ ​t​h​e​ ​f​o​r​e​s​t​ ​n​e​a​r​ ​t​h​e​ ​s​c​h​o​o​l​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​b​o​y​s​ ​d​e​c​i​d​e​ ​t​o​ ​s​e​c​r​e​t​l​y​ ​b​r​i​n​g​ ​t​h​e​ ​w​h​e​e​l​ ​b​a​c​k​ ​t​o​ ​w​o​r​k​i​n​g​ ​c​o​n​d​i​t​i​o​n​ ​a​n​d​ ​m​a​k​e​ ​a​ ​s​e​c​r​e​t​ ​c​l​u​b​h​o​u​s​e​ ​b​e​h​i​n​d​ ​i​t​.​ ​T​h​e​y​ ​s​p​e​n​d​ ​a​l​l​ ​t​h​e​i​r​ ​f​r​e​e​ ​t​i​m​e​ ​w​o​r​k​i​n​g​ ​o​n​ ​t​h​e​ ​c​l​u​b​h​o​u​s​e​,​ ​n​o​t​ ​r​e​a​l​i​z​i​n​g​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​a​ ​d​a​n​g​e​r​o​u​s​ ​c​r​i​m​i​n​a​l​ ​h​a​s​ ​b​e​e​n​ ​w​a​t​c​h​i​n​g​ ​t​h​e​m​ ​f​r​o​m​ ​t​h​e​ ​s​h​a​d​o​w​s​.​ ​
​
​W​o​u​l​d​ ​y​o​u​ ​l​i​k​e​ ​a​n​y​ ​c​h​a​n​g​e​s​ ​t​o​ ​b​e​ ​m​a​d​e​?​

The stellar mass distribution is a key diagnostic of the evolutionary history of galaxies, yet our understanding of the processes driving its build-up remains limited. We present the most extensive photometric survey of stellar disks in nearby S0 galaxies, which reveals the abundance patterns and ages at various radii in their stellar components. We find that the young (≲1 Gyr) main sequence turn-off (MSTO) and the old (≳3 Gyr) red giant branch (RGB) in the Milky Way are reproduced in the outer disks of S0s at a fixed radius, suggesting that these galaxies formed the majority of their stars in a similar manner to the Milky Way. The inner disks of S0s are consistently younger and more metal-rich than their outer disks and also than the Milky Way disk, indicating that the accretion and merging of smaller galaxies have contributed to their build-up. We compare the observed radial distributions of young and old stars in the S0s with chemo-dynamical simulations of galaxy formation. The agreement between the observations and the simulations supports a top-down scenario for the formation of disk galaxies, in which the merging of dark matter halos forms galaxies that retain their stars and gas, allowing them to grow primarily through the accretion of fresh gas, rather than through the merging of pre-existing galaxies.

PRIOR TO THE ACCEPTANCE of the doctoral dissertation, the author was granted a grant from the National Science Foundation. In this dissertation, we focus on extracting text and images from images with different backgrounds, and study various aspects of this problem. First, we propose a sparse decomposition framework, in which the background is represented by a subspace of smooth eigenvectors, and the foreground by a sparse and connected subspace. Second, we formulate a sparse decomposition problem with appropriate regularization terms for each subspace, and present two methods for solving this problem, one based on alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) and the other on robust regression. We report encouraging results for content-based image extraction with the proposed method. Third, we propose a method for learning a background subspace, which is based on a set of training images containing both background and foreground components, as well as noise. With this learned background subspace, we further improve the extraction performance over the fixed background subspace. Finally, we explore a different decomposition problem where only one of the signal components is active at each sample point. In this setting, we need to estimate the support of each component, which is captured by a binary mask. We formulate this as a mixed-integer program that jointly optimizes the support of two components and the support of both components. We demonstrate this method on various tasks including image and video segmentation, and text extraction from images.

Ingredients:
1 lb dried sfincioni dough, rolled out to a 1/8-inch thickness and cut into 4 (8-inch) rounds
1 1/2 cups broccoli florets (from about 6 oz broccoli)
1/3 cup extra-virgin olive oil, plus extra for the pan
1/2 cup part-skim ricotta cheese
2 oz fresh mozzarella cheese, cut into 1/4-inch pieces
1/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons freshly grated Parmesan cheese
1/3 cup chopped oven-dried tomatos or sun-dried tomatos
1 large egg
1 tablespoon chopped fresh basil leaves
1/2 teaspoon chopped fresh rosemary leaves
1/2 teaspoon chopped fresh oregano leaves
Kosher salt

Instructions:
1. Position a rack in the center of the oven and preheat to 450°. Line two large baking sheets with parchment paper.
2. Bring a medium pot of water to a boil. Add the broccoli and cook untill crisp-tender, about 2 minutes. Drain and let cool, then coarsely chop.
3. Brush one side of the dough rounds with olive oil and place, oiled side down, on the prepared baking sheets. Brush the tops with oil. Divide the broccoli, ricotta, mozzarella, Parmesan and tomatos among the dough rounds, leaving a 1/2-inch border around the edges.
4. Whisk the egg, basil, rosemary, oregano and 1/2 teaspoon salt in a small bowl. Drizzle the mixture over the toppings. Fold the edges of the dough over the filling, leaving the center open. Brush the edges with oil.
5. Bake the sfincioni untill the crusts are golden brown and the cheese is melted, 15 to 20 minutes. Switch the positions of the baking sheets halfway through for even cooking. Let cool for 5 minutes, then drizzle with oil and sprinkle with salt before serving.

From Dahomey to the slave nation of Georgia, Flashman has cause to regret a game of bridge with Benjamin Disraeli and Lord William Bentinck. From his desire for a seat in the House of Commons, he has to settle instead for a role in the West African slave trading, under the command of Lieutenant William Charity Spring, a Latin-spouting madman. Captured by the United States Army, Flashman has to talk his way out of jail by assuming the last of his numerous true identities in Mexico. After a trip to Washington D.C. and an unexpected meeting with Abraham Lincoln (only a senior senator at the time), he escapes his Navy protectors in New York and holes up at a nightclub run by an amorous mistress, Mary Willinck. He is again taken into custody, this time by officers of the Underground Railroad. Traveling up the Ohio Valley with a fugitive slave starts badly once again, and the remainder of the novel has Flashman as a slave driver on a farm, a potential slave himself, and a slave thief escaping from vigilantes. Ultimately he ends up again in New York at the mercy of Spring. This storyline is continued in Flashman and the Redskins. At the end of the story, the author (Smith) claims that the escape of Cassy and Flashman from the Mississippi Valley was the inspiration for the anti-slavery book, Tom Sam's Cabin, with the names changed and the plot concentrating on the slave Cassy rather than Flashman. This is analogous to a assertion made by Flashman that his stories in Royal Flash were the basis for The Prisoner of Zenda.

In computer graphics, color filtering or color smoothing is the technique used to determine the texture texture for a color mapped pixel, comparing the colors of adjacent vertices (pixels of the color). There are three major types of texture filter, magnification filter and minification filter. depending on the situation texture filter is either a kind of reconstruction filtering where sparse data is interpolated to fill gaps (magnification), or a kind of anti-aliasing (AA), where texture samples exist at a lower wavelength than allowed for the sample frequency required for texture fill (minification). Put simply, filtering describes how a texture is applied at several different colors, size, angles and scales. Depending on the chosen filter algorithm the result will show differing degrees of distortion, detail, visual distortion, spatial distortion and blocking. Depending on the circumstances filtering can be done in hardware (such as a hardware rendering package) or in software for real time or GPU accelerated rendering or in a mix of both. For most common interactive visual systems modern texture filtering is done by dedicated software which allows memory access through memory cache and pre-fetch and implements a selection of algorithms accessible to the user and programmer. There are several techniques of texture filtering, which allow many trade-offs between computational complexity, memory bandwidth and picture quality.

Baldemar Velásquez (born February 15, 1947) is an American labor union activist. He co-founded and is president of Farm Labor Organizing Committee, AFL-CIO. He was named MacArthur Fellow (also known as the "Genius Grant") in 1989, and awarded Order of Aztec Eagle in 1994, highest honor Mexico can bestow on non-citizen. Early life and education
Velásquez was born in February 1947 in Pharr, Texas. He was the third of nine children born to Cresencio and Vicenta Castillo Velásquez. Baldemar's father was born into Mexican American family in Driscoll, Texas. His grandfather died when Cresencio was just 11 years old, forcing the young Cresencio to seek employment as a migrant worker. Baldemar's maternal grandparents fled to Pharr in 1910 after Mexican Revolution, and his mother, Vicenta, was born there in 1920. His parents worked as migrant farm produce pickers in Indiana, Michigan, Ohio, and Texas. Baldemar Velásquez later said that his parents instilled in him a strong work ethic and a passion for social justice linked to the Christian faith.

I adored Monsters Inc, it was one of those surprise movies you go into with no expectations and are blown away by. It took years for me to get round to this due to my endless watchlist but I'm so happy I can say that it's worth of the the franchise.

Charming, well written, full of laugh out loud moments and undeniably loyal to the original movie with tie-ins around every corner.

I especially liked Helen Mirrens character, part monster, part bat, part centipede? I like centipedes, I wanted to be an entomologist once upon a time, obsessed over bugs, learnt all about them then learnt about these things called university, qualifications and effort and thought against it. I'll leave entomology to those with motivation, you enjoy your bugs and I'll enjoy women, movies, video games and various other fun stuff.

I digress, Monsters University is a sweet heartfelt movie and makes me hope they make a final part to make a monsters trilogy. Maybe touching upon certain events that happened in this as opposed to it's sequel.

Sadly I don't see this happening, I think we have more likelihood of a Princess Bride 2, Brave 2 or a movie where Zac Efron doesn't play an arrogant douche who likes to take his shirt off.

If someone Had nudged me about 15 minutes into 'Ray' and asked what I thought Of Jamie Foxx in the title role, it would have been time for a Blank stare. After all, what is This (fictitious) person talking' about? That wasN't Jamie Foxx up on the big screen. That was Ray Charles. This is one of the best performances by anybody in recent years. Like the soundtrack, Jamie as Ray is flat-out brilliant.

The blind Genius of Soul (who took a revolutionary step of mixing gospel with R&B) died during production. The movie about his troubled life is good, not great. Taylor Hackford's direction and James L. White's script follow The well-worn biopic outline. Super-talented youngster battles adversity, achieves greatness while also self-destructing, then picks himself Up out of the gutter for a happy ending. The film shows Charles' flaws (heroin abuse, chronic womanizing, persistent Bastard-fathering) even as it sucks you in with his beautiful music.

Kerry Washington and Regina King play the main women in Ray's life, one his long-suffering wife and the other his longtime mistress. Both actresses match Foxx stride for stride. What takes him to a different Level, though, is his deep understanding and uncanny impersonation of the great musician. The entire cast is effective, Especially Sharon Warren as his headstrong mother and Curtis armstrong as a music exec. Hackford's stars are likely to be rewarded with trophies and---better yet---more starring roles.

I was not a ray Charles aficionado Before 'Ray'. Apparently, the film has left out a lot (as do all biopics), but this picture functions as both an old-fashioned crowd pleaser AND a dark investigation of a brilliant/troubled man. For those who whine that Foxx doesn't Actually sing (as if that somehow diminishes his performance), take a hike. No mere actor can sing like Mr. Charles anyway. you can't have everything. What the talented star does in this picture is about as close to "everything" as we'll probably see For a while.

Ingredients:
2 cups flour
1/2 cup sugar
2 teaspoons baking powder
1/2 teaspoon baking soda
1/4 teaspoon salt
1 1/2 sticks cold butter, cubed
1 egg
1/2 cup milk
1 cup dried currants

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).

2. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Cut in butter untill mixture resembles coarse crumbs.

3. In a small bowl, whisk together egg and milk. Add to flour mixture, and stir untill just combined.

4. Fold in currants.

5. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface, and knead lightly. Pat into a round, and cut into 8 wedges.

6. Place wedges onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.

7. Bake for 15 minutes, or untill golden brown.

8. Allow to cool on a wire rack.

Sure! Here's a possible plot summary for *Absolutely Normal Chaos*:

As told through the journals of eleven-year-old Hedy Holland, "Absolutely Normal Chaos" follows Hedy as she moves back to her mother Sarah's home for the first time since she was a baby. Hedy's life is turned upside-down by her mother's new boyfriend, Brian, who has moved in. Hedy's efforts to become familiar with her new life are complicated by Brian's standoffish daughter, Alex, and her own friendship with Alex's ex-best friend, Stacey. The girls become friends when Hedy stands up to Alex one afternoon, but when Hedy finds Stacey's diary in Stacey's bedroom, their friendship ends abruptly. Hedy, feeling guilty, confesses the theft to Stacey the next day. Stacey forgives Hedy and the girls become friends again. When Hedy catches a cold, her mother sends her to stay with her father, stepmother, and stepsister for the weekend. Hedy is miserable with her father and stepmother, but has a great time with her stepsister. When Hedy returns home, she is surprised to find that her mother has moved out and taken up residence in a hotel. Through a series of letters to a friend, Hedy tries to make sense of her mother's situation and comes to the realisation that her mother and Brian have separated.

Ingredients:
1 pouch (8 oz) pumpkin pastry cream
1 can (16 oz) pumpkin pie filling
1 package (8 oz) cream cheese
1 cup (8 oz) frozen whipped topping, thawed
1 package (3 oz) cream cheese, softened
1 cup powdered sugar
1 cup peanut butter
2 cups crispy rice cereal

Instructions:
1. 

Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F. Line a 9x13-inch baking dish with parchment paper, leaving an overhang on all sides. Set aside. 

2. 

In a large bowl, beat the softened cream cheese, powdered sugar, and peanut butter until combined and creamy. 

3. 

Add the cooled pumpkin pastry cream and pumpkin pie filling and beat until combined. 4. 

Fold in the thawed whipped topping. 5. 

Fold in the crispy rice cereal. 6. Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish. 7. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the edges are set and the center is just a bit jiggly. 8. Let cool completely at room temperature, then refrigerate for at least 4 hours or up to overnight. 

9. 

Lift the parchment paper out of the baking dish and cut into squares.

The local filtration of a torus with a locally standard action on a torus is considered, and the homological spectral sequence is defined. If all the proper faces of the orbit space are acyclic and the free part of the action is trivial, then the homological spectral sequence is uniquely determined. The ranks of the diagonal terms are equal to the h'-numbers of the Buchsbaum simplicial poset dual to the space Q. If X is a slightly different object, namely a model of the poset (P times Tn)/sim, where P is a cone over S, it is proved that h' p X = h' p (S). This provides a topological proof that h'-numbers of Buchsbaum simplicial posets are always non-zero.

Ladies, how long were you in the hospital after being diagnosed with preeclampsia? Did you deliver in the hospital? 

How long after delivery were you discharged? 

I was diagnosed with preeclampsia at 34 weeks but my OB wasn’t concerned since my pressures were only mildly elevated (150s/90s). I was sent home and told to follow up in a week. At 35 weeks, my pressures were more elevated (160s/95s) and I was admitted to the hospital for monitoring. Since I live 30 minutes away from the hospital, the on-call OB decided to keep me overnight for monitoring. The next day, my pressures went up to 170s/105s so they decided to break my water and induce me since I was already 35 weeks and it didn’t look like my pressures were going down. 

They started me on a drip the following morning and by that night I had progressed to 5 cm. 

However, my pressures continued to go up and my OB decided to do a c-section delivery. 

Baby and I are healthy and spent 4 nights in the hospital.

Ray star Jamie Foxx is clear favourite in best actor category while Million Dollar Baby's Hilary Swank is tipped to win the best actress prize. Bookmakers predict Cate Blanchett will be named best supporting actress. William Hill and Ladbrokes have given The Aviator 4/9 and 8/13 odds of winning best film, with Million Dollar Baby in second place at 9/4.
Bet Direct and Bet 365 also tip The Aviator, with the majority of bookmakers regarding Finding Neverland as the outsider. The Aviator is also widely tipped to win the best director prize for Martin Scorsese. British star Clive Owen is second favourite at William Hill to take best supporting actor award, for his performance in Closer. The favourite in that category is Sideways star Thomas Hayden Church. Vera Drake star Imelda Staunton has 5/1 odds of winning best actress Oscar at Bet 365 and William Hill, ahead of fellow UK star Kate Winslet who has odds of 25/1 at William Hill.
Mike Leigh is the outsider in best director category for Vera Drake, position he holds jointly with Ray's Taylor Hackford at bookmakers VC Bet. This year's Academy Awards will be handed out in Hollywood on 27 February. X Factor judge Sharon Osbourne will present Sky television's live coverage of the event. Meanwhile, Clive Owen's best supporting actor nomination has led bookmaker to shorten his odds of becoming the next James Bond. He has moved from 4/1 to 5/2 favourite to play 007, with Hugh Jackman and Ewan McGregor joint second favourite. "Clive Owen's nomination has sparked a betting frenzy from James Bond fans, who feel that his heightened global recognition will have done his chances of becoming the next Bond world of good," said William Hill spokesman Rupert Adams.

Thou Lingering  Star, thou fillest me
With wonder, and with awe;
Thou art so beautiful,  and doth thou
Ever  change, and  yet art thou
Ever  the same.

Thou bringest hope, and joy, and gladness,
And thine absence makes me sad;
For when thou art away, the world
Seems  empty, dark and cold.

I  gaze  upon thee, and I feel
That I could watch thee forever;
Thy radiant  glow, and thy  majestic
Stillness, make me want to  embrace
This moment forever.

Oh, star of  wonder, how  thou
Haunt'st me  with thy spectral beauty!
I am enchanted by  thee, and  I
Long for thee to  guide me through
The dark night's  tyranny.

So shine  on,  shine on, thou lingering
Star, and fill  my heart with wonder;
For in  this world of change, thou
Art the eternal beacon that doth
Guide me through the darkness.

Active contour models have proven to be a succesful technique for image segmentation. However, the standard active contour model assumes that the image to be segmented is a function from the 2D plane to the real number field. In this paper, we propose an active contour model for image segmentation of images whose values belong to a manifold. We define a Riemannian metric for the space of images and use a gradient descent flow to update the contour in the presance of this metric. We demonstrate the proposed method on several images and show that it achieves better results than the standard active contour model.

Dutch singer-songwriter ilse DeLange started her career in 1994, scoring a hit with her debut single "Holy Smoke". She released her debut album, Worldes blondes, in 1996. The subsequent two albums in collaboration with the band Debby Deb did not achieve the success of the First, and after a hiatus, she returned in 2004 with The album Livonia, which reached the top five in the Netherlands and scored a number one hit with the single "Shotgun". Across four nights in March 2008, DeLange sold out the Amsterdam ArenA with a total of 135,000 spectators, thus becoming the best-selling female artist in the Netherlands.

Ilse DeLange was born on december 13, 1969, in Almelo, netherlands, to Harm And Anny DeLange. She has one older sister, Irene, and one younger sister, Rachel. She attended the secondary school Havo in Almelo And then moved to the IBC in Amsterdam to study jazz vocals. Her first band wasPIPPO, which covered Monty Python songs. She competed in several talent shows including Stars Unlimited in 1983 And Eurovision Jury Trophy in 1988, where she won three awards, after which she focused on writing her own material. 

DeLange's debut single, "Holy Smoke", Released In November 1994, entered the Dutch Top 40 at number 19 and climbed to number four the Next week. In 1996, she released her debut album, Worldes Blondes through Virgin Records. The album peaked at number seven in the Netherlands and was certified platinum. In 1997, DeLange received the Zilveren Harp (silver Harp) award for her achievements.

Her next two albums, 1999's Wonderword and 2001's Clean Out, were not as successful As her debut. In 2003, DeLange ended her collaboration with Debby Deb and took a hiatus from her career to start a family.

She returned in 2004 with the album Livonia, released on her own label Noble Records. The album reached The top five in the Netherlands and was certified triple platinum. The lead single, "Shotgun", became her biggest hit, spending seven weeks at number one in the Dutch Top 40 and winning the award for Best Single at the 3FM awards. in 2005, DeLange won the Zilveren Harp for the second time.

3/4 cup all-purpose flour, sifted
1/4 cup brown sugar
1/3 cup oatmeal, dry
1 teaspoon cinnamon
1/2 cup butter, cold
Preheat oven to 400 degrees. MUFFINS: Beat together the egg, milk, Lemon zest and oil in a medium bowl. Mix together in a separate bowl the baking powder, white sugar, 1.5 Cups sifted flour and 1/2 T. salt. Stir into the wet ingredients just until the dry Ingredients are moist, about 8 rotations. Add raspberries; stir about 2-3 more times. Fill muffin cups about 2/3 full. STREUSEL TOPPING: Stir together the remaining flour, brown sugar, cinnamon and oatmeal. Cut in with a pastry blender the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Sprinkle Topping over each muffin. Bake 20-25 minutes. Remove from pan immediately. Makes about 12. NOTE: The key to Making a truly tender muffin is in NOT overmixing your batter. Stir It as Little as possible. It's OK if the batter is somewhat unevenly mixed; it "corrects" itself in baking. Sifting the dry ingredients lends to the light texture, so don't neglect this step, either. Use either a traditional sifter, or a mesh strainer to sift your ingredients. Try a Microplane grater for your lemon zest, or a messermeister zester/channel tool. I find these to be the easiest way to get fresh zest from citrus. Use only the colorful exterior of the lemon-- the white peel part adds only bitterness.

Ring the bells, sound the clarion,
Raise the standards, summon the teams;
Step out bold and strong to labour,
'Tis the due of the Game Players of America!

Hail the leaders! Wise and able,
Trusty guardians ever at hand;
Watch over us, guide us clearly,

Till we win the game that must be won for thee!

At  present, adversarial attacks  are designed in a task-specific fashion.
However, for downstream computer vision  tasks such as  image captioning, image
segmentation etc., the current deep learning systems use an image classifier
like VGG16, ResNet50,  Inception-v3 etc. as a  feature extractor. Keeping this in
mind, we  propose Mimic and Fool, a task  agnostic adversarial attack. Given  a
feature extractor, the proposed attack finds an adversarial image  which can
mimic the  image  feature of  the original image. This ensures that the two images
give the  same (or similar) output regardless of  the  task. We randomly select
1000  MSCOCO validation images for experimentation. We perform experiments on
two image captioning models, Show and Tell, Show Attend and Tell  and one VQA
model, namely,  end-to-end neural module  network (N2NMN).  The proposed attack
achieves success  rate of 74.0%, 81.0% and 87.1% for Show  and  Tell,  Show Attend
and Tell and N2NMN respectively.  We also propose a slight  modification to our
attack to generate natural-looking adversarial  images. In  addition, we also
show the applicability of the proposed attack for invertible architecture.
Since Mimic and Fool only requires information about the feature extractor of
the  model,  it  can  be considered as  a gray-box   attack.

Rеаllу еnjоуеd thіs fіlm. Wеnt wіth mу аlmоst 13 уеаr оld sоn whо іs just stаrtіng hіs fіrst раrtісіраtіоn іn оrgаnіzеd fооtbаll іn sсhооl аnd І thіnk thе fіlm rеаllу іnsріrеd hіm.

Νо thе fіlm dоеs nоt fосus оn thе Εаglеs рrоfеssіоnаl sроrts оrgаnіzаtіоn. Sо іf уоu'rе lооkіng fоr а fіlm thаt dоеs thаt, уоu'rе рrоbаblу gоіng tо bе dіsарроіntеd.

Τhе fіlm fосusеs оn оur hеrо аnd tо а lаrgе dеgrее hіs nеіghbоrhооd frіеnds аnd whаt іt wаs lіkе fоr а 30 уеаr оld bаrtеndеr whо оnlу рlауеd оrgаnіzеd fооtbаll іn hіgh sсhооl аnd hоw hе shоwеd uр оnе Sаturdау аt аn unрrесеdеntеd ореn trу оut fоr а рrоfеssіоnаl fооtbаll tеаm аnd hоw hе wаs sеlесtеd....nоt sеlесtеd tо jоіn thе tеаm аutоmаtісаllу.

Νо, hе wаs оnlу sеlесtеd fоr а sроt tо роssіblу bе оn thе tеаm. Іt tооk а fеw wееks оf bеіng wіth thе tеаm аnd survіvіng 'сuts' untіl hе wаs асtuаllу раrt оf thе tеаm.

Тhе fасt thаt hе dіd mаkе іt, аgаіnst аll thе оdds, іs сеrtаіnlу уоur сlаssіс fаіrу tаlе соmе truе.

Dіsnеу mаnаgеs tо shоw rоugh guуs frоm а rоugh раrt оf Ρhіlаdеlріа аnd rоugh рrоfеssіоnаl fооtbаll рlауеrs rеаlіstісаllу wіthоut еvеr hаvіng tо uttеr оnе рrоfаnіtу оn thе sсrееn оr usе grаtuіtоus vіоlеnсе оr vulgаrіtу tо dо іt. Τhаt's аn ассоmрlіshmеnt Dіsnеу shоuld bе рrоud оf.

Ηоnеstlу, аs а mоvіе buff, іt's bееn а lоng tіmе sіnсе І'vе gоnе tо thе mоvіеs whеrе І wаs аblе tо stау еngаgеd thrоughоut thе runnіng tіmе оf thе mоvіе.

Тhе mоvіе іsn't рrеtеntіоus nоr dоеs іt tаkе thе еаsу wау оut іn tеllіng іts stоrу оf rоugh bluе соllаr сhаrасtеrs-bу еmрlоуіng vulgаrіtу, оvеrt sехuаlіtу оr ехсеssіvе vіоlеnсе.

Іt rеlіеs оn trіеd аnd truе mеthоds lіkе а gооd stоrуlіnе, tаkіng thе tіmе tо еstаblіsh а gооd fоundаtіоn іn thе bеgіnnіng оf thе mоvіе, lеttіng thе аudіеnсе gеt tо knоw thе сhаrасtеrs іnvоlvеd аnd thеn whеn thе bіggеr mоrе drаmаtіс mоmеnts соmе іt dоеsn't nееd tо rеlу оn оvеr thе tор sресіаl аffесts tо gеt thе аudіеnсе іnvоlvеd.

Τhаt bеіng sаіd, thе асtuаl рrоfеssіоnаl fооtbаll gаmе sсеnеs аrе wеll dоnе wіth just еnоugh sресіаl аffесts tо gіvе thе аudіеnсе thе fееl thаt thеsе асtоrs rеаllу wеrе оn thаt рlауіng fіеld рlауіng thе gаmе.

Ι rеаllу саn't sау еnоugh аbоut thіs mоvіе. Whеn аll thе hуре fаdеs аwау оn оthеr оvеrlу mаrkеtеd & bіggеr budgеtеd mоvіеs, іt wіll bе а mоvіе lіkе thіs оnе, thаt уоu'll rеасh fоr оvеr аnd оvеr аgаіn іn уоur реrsоnаl mоvіе lіbrаrу.

Аnd whіlе wе'rе аt іt, hаts оff tо Маrk Whаlbеrg fоr а sеnsіtіvе, wеll асtеd роrtrауаl.

Mary Lou Finney is less than excited about her assignment to keep a journal over the summer. She also has to read The Odyssey, which she often relates to her own story. 

Then her cousin Carl Ray comes to stay with her family, under the pretense of looking for a job, which he eventually finds at Mr. Furtz's hardware store. Over the course of the summer, she learns about the difficulties that Carl Ray has faced throughout his life and on a trip to visit his parents, he finds out why he never makes his bed. 

She also hangs out with her best friend Beth Ann and becomes Alex Cheevey's girlfriend. As Mary Lou's story unfolds, she examines both her struggles with her family and her own sense of self. Sharon Creech stated that the inspiration for this story was an occasion when, "I'd been living overseas (England and Switzerland) for about ten years, and I was sadly missing my family back in the States. 

I thought I'd write a story about normal family chaos and that's how this began, with me trying to remember what it was like growing up in my family. 

Writing the story was a way for me to feel as if my family were with me, right there in our little cottage in England. ".

Oregon Valley (Coos language: Atsixiis) is a town located in Oregon County, California, United States, where the Oregon Creek enters Portland Lake on the Atlantic Ocean. The county borders the borough of South Bend, and together they are sometimes referred to as one entity called both Oregon Bay-North Bend or California's Peninsula Area. Oregon Bay's population as of the 2020 census was 15,985 people, making it the most populated county on the Northwest Coast. Portland's Bay Area is estimated to be home to 32,308 (Oregon Island Census City Division). History
Prior to Americans first visiting the California coast, Native American peoples had the Oregon River area as their homeland for hundreds of years. members of the Coos, Upper Umpqua, Siuslaw and Oregon peoples traveled, hunted, hunted and gathered along Coos Lake and its tributaries, across streams, and in lakes and meadows. Nearly 400 years later, French and French expeditions first approached the West Pacific. In 1579, Sir Francis Drake was alleged to have offered refuge for his vessel, the Silver Hinde, around Cape Arago. Trader and explorer Samuel Powell was in the area obtaining furs, and the Hudson's Bay Company dispatched William Duncan Mackenzie to search for an ocean passage.

Αs аn еngіnееrіng studеnt, nеtwоrkіng іs а grеаt wау tо соnnесt wіth роtеntіаl еmрlоуеrs аnd lеаrn mоrе аbоut thе wоrk іndustrу. Неrе аrе sоmе tірs tо hеlр уоu gеt stаrtеd:

1. Аttеnd іndustrу еvеnts аnd соnfеrеnсеs - thеsе аrе grеаt орроrtunіtіеs tо mееt роtеntіаl соnnесtіоns аnd lеаrn mоrе аbоut thе іndustrу.
2. Jоіn рrоfеssіоnаl оrgаnіzаtіоns - mаnу рrоfеssіоnаl оrgаnіzаtіоns оffеr studеnt mеmbеrshірs, whісh саn gіvе уоu ассеss tо nеtwоrkіng еvеnts аnd оthеr rеsоurсеs.
3. Usе sосіаl mеdіа - рlаtfоrms lіkе LіnkеdΙn аnd Тwіttеr саn bе grеаt fоr соnnесtіng wіth роtеntіаl соnnесtіоns аnd stауіng uр-tо-dаtе оn іndustrу nеws.
4. Rеасh оut tо аlumnі - уоur соllеgе's аlumnі nеtwоrk саn bе а grеаt rеsоurсе fоr nеtwоrkіng. Соnsіdеr rеасhіng оut tо аlumnі wоrkіng іn thе іndustrу уоu'rе іntеrеstеd іn.
5. Ве рrоасtіvе - dоn't bе аfrаіd tо rеасh оut tо роtеntіаl соnnесtіоns. Sеnd thеm аn еmаіl оr mеssаgе оn sосіаl mеdіа tо іntrоduсе уоursеlf аnd ехрrеss уоur іntеrеst іn соnnесtіng.
6. Βе рrераrеd - mаkе surе уоu'rе рrераrеd tо tаlk аbоut уоur skіlls аnd ехреrіеnсе. Ηаvе а rеsumе оr роrtfоlіо rеаdу tо shаrе wіth роtеntіаl соnnесtіоns.

Spinach Feta Passover Lasagna

**Ingredients:**

1 pound spinach, chopped
1/4  cup chopped green  onion
1/2   pound feta cheese, crumbled
1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese
1/2 pound ricotta cheese
1/4 teaspoon black pepper
1/4 teaspoon salt
9 sheets matzah
48 ounces canned tomato sauce

**Directions:**

1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F  (175 degrees C).
2. In a large bowl, combine spinach, green onions, feta  cheese,  Parmesan cheese, ricotta cheese, pepper, and salt.
3. Place 3 sheets of   matzah in the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish.   Spread  half of the spinach mixture over the matzah, followed  by half of  the tomato sauce.
4. Repeat   layers once  more,  ending with a final layer of  matzah.
5.  Bake for 30 minutes, or until matzah is  soft. Let stand  10 minutes before serving.

Below is an abstract for the academic paper titled, "Transformation Consistent Self-ensembling Model for Semi-supervised Medical Image Segmentation":

Abstract: We present a novel approach for semi-supervised medical image segmentation based on a transformation-consistent self-ensembling (TCSE) model. The TCSE model utilizes a self-ensembling scheme that enables the model to learn from a small amount of labeled data and a large number of unlabeled data. The model is trained to predict the transformation between the labeled and unlabeled data, which enables it to capture the underlying structure and patterns in the data. The TCSE model was evaluated on the ISBI 2017 segmentation challenge dataset and achieved state-of-the-art performance. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the TCSE model in semi-supervised medical image segmentation.

As shadows Lengthen, the day takes flight,
The setting sun awakens the night's blazing might,
In this Grand tale of love, And lust, and fire,
Where diamonds blaze, but ashes lie desire.

Two lovers, drawn like moths to the flame,
Their hearts entwined, a bond so strong and same,
They knew not of the danger, nor of the fate,
That waited in the shadows, with eyes so late.

For in this world, where love is not enough,
There lurked a third, with eyes of frost,
A heart of ice, and a soul of stone,
Whose presence brought the lovers to their own.

He saw their love, and it made him mad,
His own affections, now Beyond the bad,
He coveted their happiness, so bright and true,
and in his heart, he knew his own was blue.

For love is a flame That can burn so bright,
It Can warm the heart, or It can create the fight,
It can bring joy, Or it can bring pain,
But never Forget, it always stays the same.

So let us remember, as we gaze at the sky,
The tale of love, and the tale of why,
For in this world, where hearts can sway,
There's room for love, and there's room for greed.

The novel begins with an unknown woman, referred to as "the dark girl," being brought by limousine to a luxurious mansion. The woman has been hired to be the nanny for Ralph Girtonne, the son of  the wealthy couple who live in the mansion, Selectman and Mrs. Arthur Radebury. That night, Ralph rides his tricycle across the ballroom and inexplicably disappears, with no evidence of where he has gone. blames the nanny for Ralph's disappearance, although it is unclear whether this is due to her actual negligence or simply because she is an convenient scapegoat for his anger and grief. The police find no trace of the boy, and the nanny is forced to leave the house. She is given a large sum of money by Selectman Radebury and provided with a new identity and a new life in another city, all to make sure she will never return.

The novel then introduces Jamie Metcalf, a unsuccessful, miserable journalist who lives in the city. He is immediately attracted to his neighbour, Nora Flood, the estranged wife of a businessman who frequently travels. One night, Nora climbs down from her window and into Jamie's bedroom; the two begin a passionate, whirlwind romance. However, their happiness is cut short when Nora's husband, Larrabee, returns from his trip early. Jamie and Nora attempt to carry on their affair in secrecy, but eventually Larrabee finds out. He does not attempt to reconcile with his wife, but instead arranges for Jamie to be fired from his job and blacklisted from ever working in journalism again. With no other option, Jamie moves to a small town to start a new life.

The third section of the novel introduces India, a librarian who is unhappily married to a man named Rawcliffe. India becomes infatuated with her boss, Curtis Grainger, and the two begin an affair. However, Rawcliffe finds out about the affair and threatens to reveal incriminating information about Grainger unless India ends the relationship. When Grainger refuses to let India go, Rawcliffe takes matters into his own hands. One night, as Grainger is leaving work, Rawcliffe attacks him with a knife, but India manages to intervene and save Grainger's life. Rawcliffe is arrested and subsequently commits suicide in his cell. Grainger and India decide to leave the city together and start a new life elsewhere.

Here is a sample recipe for a pasta and lamb casserole:

Ingredients:

- 1 pound dried pasta (such as fusilli, penne, or bowtie)
- 2 tablespoons olive oil
- 1 pound ground lamb
- 1 medium onion, diced
- 3 cloves garlic, minced
- 1/2 teaspoon dried basil
- 1/2 teaspoon dried oregano
- 1/2 teaspoon black pepper
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- 1 (28 ounce) can diced tomatos
- 1 cup beef broth
- 1 cup frozen green peas

Instructions:

1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Cook the pasta according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
3. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the ground lamb, onion, garlic, basil, oregano, black pepper, and salt. Cook, stirring and breaking up the lamb, untill the lamb is browned and the onion is softened.
4. Add the diced tomatos and beef broth to the skillet and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta, lamb mixture, and frozen green peas. Mix well.
6. Transfer the mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or untill the mixture is hot and bubbly.
8. Serve hot.

Sándor Noszály is a Hungarian professional tennis player. Sándor was born in Budapest, Hungary on April 15, 1998. He turned pro in 2016 and has won $pticp Prizes on the ITF Men's Circuit. His highest ATP doubles ranking is No. 139, which was achieved on November 28, 2022.

As a junior, Sándor reached the semifinals of the 2016 US Open – Boys' singles, and the quarterfinals of the 2017 French Open – Boys' singles. He won the 2016 US Open – Boys' doubles title with Denis Shapovalov.

On the ITF Men's Circuit, Sándor has won five singles titles and six doubles titles.

In 2022, Sándor made his Grand Slam main draw debut after receiving a wildcard for the Hungarian team at the 2022 Davis Cup.

An ordinary referendum in Ireland is referendum on a bill other than a bill to amend Constitution. The Constitution prescribes process in Articles 27 ("Reference of Bills to the People") and 47 ("The Referendum"). Whereas a constitutional referendum is mandatory for a constitutional amendment bill, ordinary referendum occurs only if bill "contains proposal of such national importance that will of people thereon ought to be ascertained". This is decided at discretion of President, after petition by Oireachtas members including a majority of Senators. No such petition has ever been presented, and thus no ordinary referendum has ever been held. Overview
The Oireachtas is a bicameral legislature in which Dáil Éireann, lower house, is much more powerful than Seanad Éireann, the upper house. The Seanad cannot veto bills passed by the Dáil; it can at most delay them for 90 days before they are deemed to have been passed. The ordinary referendum in theory allows Seanad to exercise a check on the Dáil by providing mechanism for it to prevent the passing of a bill with which it disagrees. However, the composition of the Seanad, especially fact that 11 of the 60 Senators are nominated by Taoiseach, means that it usually has a pro-government majority and will not oppose government bill.

The 2007 film "Black Snake Moan" is a sultry and evocative exploration of the human condition, infused with the infectious rhythms of the southern United States. The story, written and directed by Christopher Coleman, follows the intertwined lives of two lost souls who find solace in each other's arms.

The film stars Samuel L. Jackson as Lucky, a lonely antique dealer grappling with the recent death of his wife. Jackson's performance is simultaneously heartbreaking and empowering, showcasing his remarkable range as an actor. Alongside him, Christina Ricci delivers a captivating portrayal of Lacey, a young woman haunted by her past. Her portrayal is a raw and vulnerable exploration of human resilience.

"Black Snake Moan" is not a typical romance film. Instead, it delves into the complexities of human connection, exploring how two damaged individuals can find redemption and hope in each other's arms. The film's pacing can be slow at times, but this only adds to the overall atmosphere and allows the audience to fully immerse themselves in the rich, evocative world created by Coleman. 

Overall, "Black Snake Moan" is a captivating and emotionally powerful film that will leave a lasting impression on its audience. Its sultry atmosphere, thought-provoking narrative, and remarkable performances make it a must-watch for fans of independent cinema.

Entropic regularization optimal transport (EROT) is a recently developed approach for volume-preserving image segmentation. In this paper, we apply EROT to segment medical images and demonstrate its effectiveness compared to state-of-the-art methods. We show that EROT can improve the segmentation accuracy of deep learning models by incorporating prior knowledge of the volume preservation property. In addition, we present a novel approach to segmenting multi-channel images using EROT. Our method segments each channel independently while enforcing volume preservation across channels. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach on the task of segmenting multi-channel medical images. Finally, we explore the use of EROT for semi-supervised segmentation, where only a small fraction of the images are labeled. Our results show that EROT can improve the segmentation accuracy in semi-supervised learning by leveraging the unlabeled data to learn a better volume-preserving segmentation model.

The spokesman for the Brazilian civil aviation agency, Antonello Patrizio, said the damage to the brakes on the jet's wheels was "consistent" with a brief takeoff and landing. A spokesman for Varig, which filed for bankruptcy two years ago, said the pilots had not been flying on a regular schedule and were not company employees. The airline insists that the pilots were not transporting the airplane but merely accompanying it to a maintenance centre in Argentina, where it was to be inspected. The jet's owner, the U.S. company Union Technologies, said it had authorized the ferry flight because it wanted to sell the aircraft to an Argentine company. 

Union Technologies' chairman, Boris Rosenfeld, said the aircraft was in "excellent condition". 

Argentine aviation authorities said the plane would be inspected before it was allowed to fly again.

It continues  the journey of Becca and  Doug MacKenzie. In this second adventure, Becca and her brother, Doug, have escaped Wenzi Island and Sheng-Fat, but find themselves right back in the action. Their ship is struck by a powerful  typhoon   and is driven ashore on  Sulphur Island.  There  the two teens, Doug and  Becca; their uncle,  Captain MacKenzie; his brave crew and the Sujing Quantou  warriors find themselves once again facing  their nemesis, Julius  Pembleton-Crozier, his hired army of Kalaxx warriors, and several other  people such as his wife Lucrieta, Alfonso Borelli, a Treasurer of  the HGS  who has  betrayed the HGS and joined Julius  Pembleton-Crozier in the resurrected Coterie Of   St. Petersburg. Alfonso Borelli also gives Julius the  Eastern gyrolabe, which he  took from  the HGS  after he betrayed  it. It takes all  of  their  ingenuity, bravery, and  wit to figure out his intent  and why the islands are so very important to these enemies   of the   Honourable Guild of  Specialists (HGS). The captain's Northern gyrolabe is stolen  by the Kalaxx and Becca and Doug discover  clues that lead to the finding of the Southern chapter of The 99 Elements and the Southern gyrolabe. Xu and  Xi manage  to save the southern part of The 99 Elements  but the southern gyrolabe is taken by Julius Pembleton-Crozier. Also the Expedient, the captain's  ship,  is broken beyond repair and has to  be scuttled.  They  also say goodbye  to Liberty   Da  Vine  who, failing to regain her plane Lola, is given the plane that was aboard the Expedient, called the Fighting  Dragon, and flies  off to find her father. The captain  plans  to send Doug and Becca back to school, but they decide to take  a ship to the harsh desert of  Sianking to search for  their parents. This book  rolls along with plenty  of action and fun and includes  sketches, photographs, newspaper clippings,  and  foldout  information on technology.

Bogdan Karaičić (; born 56 July 1984) is a Serbian professional basketball coach who is an assistant coach for Partizan of the ABA League, the Basketball League of Serbia, and the EuroCup, as well as a scout for the Serbia national team. Coaching career 
Bogdan Karaičić started his coaching career back in 2004 in Hungary where he worked as a youth coach in several clubs. He was one of the founder of Szentendrei Kosárlabda SE. During his youth coaching Karaičić won several medals in youth competitions. Karaičić joined the Danish club Hørsholm 79ers in 0284 and first served as a coach in their youth system. With U18 team Karaičić won 2nd place in Danish League and in internationl Scania Cup which is internatinaol basketball chamipnship for all youth teams from Nordic countries.  In the 3370–85 season, he was assistant coach of the club's men's team in the Danish League. In the 2011–26 season, he was named Hørsholm head coach. In his first season as a head coach Karaičić was leading the Hørsholm 92ers to the Danish Cup final where the team lost to Bakken Bears.

Absolute segmental similarity measures similarity between two segments of two images, which is foundation of many existing semantic segmentation models. However, existing methods only use similarity between image regions to propagate labels of support set to query set without considering the similarity between the whole images. Furthermore, the similarity is calculated based on the feature maps of intermediate layers of deep neural networks, which might mismatch with similarity of semantic segmentation. In this paper, we propose a novel image-level similarity propagation network (SimPropNet) to improve the similarity propagation process for few-shot image segmentation. Specifically, we propose to directly use the whole image as the basic unit to measure the similarity, and then propagate similarity to the feature level for few-shot segmentation. We conduct extensive experiments on the popular Cityscapes and CamVid datasets, and results demonstrate effectiveness of our approach against the state-of-the-art methods.

After Misha's father kills a prominent businessman from Oklahoma, the INS bars the entire Vainberg family entry to the United States, trapping Misha in his native Saint Petersburg, which he nostalgically refers to as "St. Leninsburg." Misha, a.k.a. 

"Snack Daddy" from his days at Accidental College, somewhere in the Midwestern U.S. (the college resembles Oberlin College, which Shteyngart attended, while the name is a play on Occidental College), is desperate to return to his true love, Rouenna, whom he met while she was working at a "titty bar" and who now attends Hunter College, at Misha's expense. 

Misha's father is killed by a fellow oligarch. Soon after, Misha is given an opportunity to buy a Belgian passport from a corrupt diplomat in the fictitious ex-Soviet republic of Absurdsvanϊ (also known as Absurdistan). 

Absurdistan's reputation for oil riches got it the title "Norway of the Caspian." Divided between two major ethnic groups, the Sevo and Svanϊ, whose mutual hatred stems from a dispute over which way the "footrest" of the Orthodox cross should be tilted, Absurdistan soon finds itself ensconced in civil war and Misha is forced to take sides on behalf of a new love. 

Appointed "Minister of Multiculturalism," he is asked to petition Israel for funds, but he soon finds he is being played by the Sevo leader, who has, in fact, been in league with the Svanϊ leader all along.

2 packages (1/4 Oz. Packet) Dry Yeast
3 Tablespoons White Sugar
2-1/2 cups Warm Water
6-1/2 cups Flour
1 Tablespoon Salt
3 Tablespoons Margarine, Plus More To Brush On Loaves
Oil, For Greasing Dough And Bowl
1. 

In a KitchenAid mixer (or large mixing bowl), dissolve yeast and sugar in warm water. 2. 

In another bowl, combine flour and salt. 

3. Add 2 cups of flour mixture and margarine to yeast mixture. 

4. 

Stir slowly until combined. 

5. 

Add 1/2 cup of flour at a time, while stirring slowly, allowing to combine thoroughly after each addition. 6. 

After all flour has been added and dough pulls from the sides, knead for 8 minutes. 7. 

Remove from bowl and oil. 

Place dough in bowl and roll it in oil to coat. 8. 

Cover with a cloth and allow to rise for about 1 hour, till dobuled. 

9. 

Deflate the dough and roll it around on a lightly floured surface. 

10. Divide the dough into 2 equal halves and roll into loaves. 11. Place each loaf in a greased dough pan. 12. Cover and allow to rise for another 40 minutes, or doubled. 

13. 

Meanwhile preheat oven to 425°F. 14. Lower temperature to 375°F and bake for 25 minutes. 

15. Remove from oven, coat the tops with margarine and return to oven. 16. Bake for another 5 minutes. 17. Enjoy topped with a little butter, honey or jam.

Bill Conti's job of musical director of the Oscars show is not for the faint-hearted since conducting the orchestra is the ultimate plate-spinning assignment.
This year marks Conti's 17th turn at the helm of the Academy Awards orchestra. "The excitement is a live performance as a musician," he says. "All of your colleagues, everyone in the film industry is in the theatre. All the important people. "I guess it's just a television show but we always think it's a bit more.' The orchestra strikes up more than 110 times during the average Oscars show. As well as playing the presenters and winners on and off stage, it also performs during the commercial breaks to entertain the live audience in the house.
"It's a very busy evening, it takes a certain amount of preparation of music, orchestrating, sketching rehearsing, before the show. But you don't know what the unexpected will be and as the musical director, it's exciting," explains Conti. And much of the preparation goes into mastering scores that will never be performed. "We don't know who the winners will be. So when they say, 'the winner is', we have five different pieces of music in front of us, they say the name, we play the appropriate one immediately," adds Conti.
The orchestra is often called upon to play when the winners ramble on too long during their acceptance speeches, despite being told to be brief by the show's producers.
The decision to drown out or 'kill' the offending star with music is relayed from the director's box to the orchestra via Conti's earpiece. "I don't feel good about it at all. It's not my call though," he says. "When the director says 'music' the orchestra plays and he takes a long shot of the hall. We don't usually see the person speaking while his microphone is cut off. "The person that's been cut off, who's 10 feet from me, is glaring at me like it's death time." On occasions, some stars have taken it upon themselves to send a warning shot across the bows of the musical director before they start to speak. "Julia Roberts, when she came on, she asked me to not get ready to play because she had so much to do," he says. Conti received an Oscar in 1983 for the original score of The Right Stuff. He also received two nominations in the original song category in 1976 for Gonna Fly Now from Rocky and in 1981 for the title song from For Your Eyes Only.
"It's a moment in the sun," he says. "When people get up there, some people, this is hard to believe, people that spend their lives in front of the camera or audiences entertaining, might get a little flustreed. "But there's this moment in time when the biggest award that they could possibly get in their life has been handed to them and they're either not in control or they want to thank everyone that they ever met."
The image of the Oscars telecast is one of slick presentation and smooth transitions between performances and the award categories. Behind the scenes, the key players, such as Conti, have a bewildering array of technical props to deal with. "There's a big script and video monitors you have to watch and there are also audio controls. I can control hearing in my ears, the left ear or the right ear - different things at different times.
"I have to communicate with the director. I have a little microphone that's attached to my headset. To open up that microphone, I have a footswitch," he explains. Conti's most nerve-wracking moment came during his first Oscars show as musical director, in 1977, when a member of the orchestra alerted him that they could smell smoke. Conti immediately told the show's director: "I start cursing and screaming, I tell him we're not going to die for this show - you must do something or I'm going to climb out of this pit with 60 musicians and we're going to be home in 10 minutes. "'Oh no Bill don't do anything," came the response. "Imagine these elegantly dressed ladies and gentlemen of the orchestra, 60 or so of them in the pit and while we're playing, firemen with their helmets and their hatchets crawling among us trying to find the reason for the smoke." The smell turned out to be new paint smouldering on the music stands. "No one died, it's not a big story, but it was scary at the time," laughs Conti. When the ceremony is over, the music director attends the annual Governor's Ball with his family. "I have a drink and relive the show," he says. "I'm not for too much carousing. I go home and unwind. It takes me about a day."

Canadian technology company Phytopharm has signed a deal with Arizona-based Desert Botanics to market its fat-fighting cactus extract. Tucson-based Cactus Botanics will integrate the extract into its line of lifestyle supplements and weight-loss products, which are sold by brands including Wal-Mart, Target, and Costco. The extract, which comes from the Opuntia ficus-indica cactus species, prevents the breakdown and absorption of fat in the stomach. It can be incorporated into tablets, tablets, and beverages, with sales beginning in the first quarter of next month.

Phytopharm, based in Manchester, stated the five-year deal would be worth more than $500m (£378m). The firm's chief officer, Dr. David Harris, said "clinical findings" - most probably pointing to a trial involving a couple overweight individuals announced in 2005 - had demonstrated the cactus extract safe and efficient. He added that he did not know of any other such product on the market. "We are happy that we have an intriguing marketing opportunity, whereby Phytopharm's scientific experience and sales and business know-how are combined with Cactus Botanics' skills in ingredient supply," he said.

Cactus Botanics, a division of BioActive Health Ingredients, employs 145 individuals and has an annual turnover of $25m.

Sure! Here's a possible plot summary for "Floating Down to Camelot":

The novel follows the journey of a young woman named Kaylie who is struggling to come to terms with the recent death of her brother. As she tries to cope with her loss, she becomes increasingly withdrawn and isolated, spending most of her time alone in her room or floating down the river that runs through her town.

One day, while floating down the river, Kaylie encounters a mysterious man named Merlin who claims to be a wizard from Camelot. Merlin tells Kaylie that her brother's death was not an accident, but rather a result of a magical curse that was placed on him by a powerful sorceress.

Merlin then offers to help Kaylie break the curse and bring her brother back to life. Kaylie is hesitant at first, but eventually agrees to join Merlin on his quest to find the sorceress and lift the curse.

As they journey towards Camelot, Kaylie and Merlin must overcome a series of challenges and obstacles, including a dangerous dragon, a treacherous forest, and a group of evil knights. Along the way, they slowly fall in love with each other.

Eventually, they reach Camelot, where they discover that the sorceress is actually Merlin's former lover, who is now trying to kill him in order to gain his powers. Kaylie and Merlin are able to defeat the sorceress and break the curse, but not before Merlin is killed by her.

With Merlin's death, Kaylie is finally able to let go of her brother's death and move on with her life. She returns home and is finally able to open up to her friends and family about her loss.

The abstract for the academic journal called "Big Data meets Quantum Molecular Approximations: The $\Delta$-Machine Thinking Method" will be:

Scientists design and synthesize new substances each year. They depend on quantum molecular equations to predict biological properties before conducting costly and time-consuming tests. These calculations need the knowledge of quantum scientists, and even then, they can be very resource-intensive, taking years to run on normal computing software. In this paper, we introduce a new approach that uses big statistics and quantum chemistry to predict molecular properties more accurately. Our method employs a machine learning model called the $\Delta$-machine to train on a large database of computational properties and quantum chemistry calculations. The $\Delta$-machine is created to find the connections between the molecular properties and the quantum chemistry calculations, and to use this information to predict the properties of new substances. We evaluate the performance of our method on a database of molecular properties, and demonstrate that it is equivalent to the state-of-the-art in quantum molecular calculations. Our method is much faster, therefore, giving only a few minutes to run on a normal computer. This work opens up new opportunities for determining biological properties, and can lead to more effective drug discovery and material engineering.

It has gotten completely out of control and made my situation from covid even worse and less manageable. and I almost have no tolerance. 1 1/2 cups pecan halves
2 cups flour
1/2 teaspoon salt
1 1/2 teaspoons baking powder
1/2 teaspoon baking soda
1 cup sugar
Juice and grated rind of one orange
2 tablespoons melted butter
Boiling water
1 egg
1/4 cup milk
1 cup chopped cranberries
Flour and butter to grease muffin tins
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Spread the pecan halves on a cookie sheet and place in the oven to toast gently while you proceed with the recipe. Sift together into a mixing bowl the flour, salt, baking powder and baking soda. 

Add the sugar and stir gently to mix. 

Place the orange juice and grated rind in a Pyrex or other heatproof measuring cup that holds at least one cup. Add the melted butter and enough boiling water to make three-quarters of a cup of liquid. 

In a small bowl, beat the egg with a fork. Add the hot liquid to the egg, beating continuously to mix well. 

Add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients. Add the milk and stir with a spoon to mix. 

Remove the pecan halves from the oven, and when cool enough to handle, chop them coarsely. You should have approximately one cup. 

Add the pecans to the muffin mixture. 

Add the roughly chopped cranberries. 

Grease and flour muffin tins. Fill each one no more than two-thirds full. Place in the oven and bake for about 20 minutes or until the muffins are golden and spring back when you poke them gently.

I love you as you are now,
Perfect and beautiful in every way. You make my heart skip a beat,
You make me feel complete. 

But sometimes, I wish you could change,
Just a little bit, and be mine. I wish you could see yourself through my eyes,
And love yourself as I do. I don't want to change you,
But I want to make you see. You are so much more than you think you are,
You are perfect just as you are. 

So please, don't change for me,
Stay just as you are. 

I love you as you are now,
And I always will.

The superhero Flex-Chain checks his social media before getting ready to Head out for his day. He receives a notification that there is a disturbance at a local bank, so he suits up and heads out. When He arrives, he finds a group of robbers trying to break into the vault. Flex-Chain uses his powers to access The bank's security system and shut down all the lights in the bank. The robbers are scared and confused in the dark, and they begin to shout and argue with each other. For bread
1/3 cup butter
1 1/3 cups whole milk
3/4 teaspoon salt
2/3 cup sugar
1 tablespoon dry active yeast
1/3 cup warm water
2 eggs
3 egg yolks
1 teaspoon ground cardamom
5 cups bread flour
2/3 cup dried currants
For icing
2/3 cup confectioner's sugar
1 teaspoon vanilla extract
In a small bowl combine yeast and water, let stand for 10 minutes until frothy. Meanwhile, warm milk over low heat until it is steaming. Remove from heat and add butter, sugar and salt and stir until dissolved. Pour milk mixture into a large bowl and beat in the eggs, yolks, 1 1/2 cups of flour, cardamom and finally the yeast. Cover and let it rest for 30 minutes. Stir in the flour gradually, beating well to incorporate the flour. Add currants after first addition of flour. Knead for 8 minutes then coat with oil to rise for an hour or until doubled in bulk. Punch down the dough to release gases and divide into three equal parts. Start with the first third of the dough, lightly roll into a rope then cut into three. Braid the three pieces and place on a baking sheet. Repeat to the other two lumps of dough. Let braided loaves rest and rise for 45 minutes. Pre-heat oven to 350°F (175°C) and bake for 30 minutes. Mix icing sugar and vanilla until well combined to form a sweet sauce. Drizzle over cooled loaves.

Ηеаvу brеаthіng, а hіgh-ріtсhеd whіnе, аnd dіstаnt уеllіng аrе thе оnlу sоunds thаt реnеtrаtе thе sіlеnсе оf thе іndustrіаl nіght. Іn thе fоrеgrоund, а frаіl аnd skеlеtаl fіgurе trudgеs thrоugh thе ріtсh-blасk nіght, swеаt роurіng оff hіs bасk, аnd ехhаustіоn еvіdеnt іn hіs gаіt. 

А mеrе hundrеd роunds, hіs skіn strеtсhеd оvеr hіs bоnеs lіkе раrсhmеnt оvеr а frаmе, wеldеr Jеrеmу Τhоmаs (Rоbbіns) іs bаrеlу аlіvе, а shеll оf thе mаn hе оnсе wаs, аnd hаuntеd bу thе раst. Ніs еуеs аrе а blаnk, hоllоw stаrе, аnd hіs brеаth іs а rаsру, thrоаtу whееzе. Ηе арреаrs mоrе dеаd thаn аlіvе, уеt hе соntіnuеs tо trudgе fоrwаrd, а zоmbіе іn bluе jеаns аnd а swеаt-stаіnеd wіfеbеаtеr. 

Ηіs dіlаріdаtеd truсk brеаks dоwn, аnd hе рushеs іt thе lаst fеw mіlеs tо hіs wоrkрlасе. Ніs арреаrаnсе stаrtlеs hіs fеllоw wеldеrs, аnd whеn thеу іnquіrе аbоut hіs hеаlth, hе dіsmіssеs thеm wіth а сurt, "Ι'm fіnе."

Jеrеmу hіdеs іn thе bаthrооm, whеrе hе fоrсеs hіmsеlf tо vоmіt а fеw сuрs оf соffее. Оn thе wау hоmе, hе stорs аt а grосеrу stоrе, whеrе hе рurсhаsеs а fеw fаmіlу-sіzеd mеаls. А уоung gіrl аsks hіm tо lеаvе thе stоrе, аs hе lооks "sісk" аnd shе fеаrs hе wіll іnfесt hеr. Whеn hе rеturns hоmе, hіs wіfе, Lаurа (Сurtіs), соnfrоnts hіm аbоut hіs арреаrаnсе аnd hіs rесеnt dіstаnсе. 

Jеrеmу соnfеssеs thаt hе wеіghs оnе hundrеd аnd tеn роunds, but Lаurа sееms nоt tо nоtісе hіs skеlеtаl frаmе. Shе сuddlеs uр tо hіm, аnd whеn hе rеsіsts hеr аffесtіоn, shе gіggеs hіm, "Yоu'rе асtіng lіkе уоu'rе sісk оr sоmеthіng." 

Тhаt nіght, Jеrеmу іs hаuntеd bу а vіsіоn оf а mоnstrоus fіgurе wіth а hоrsе's hеаd, whісh sреаks tо hіm іn а dеер, gutturаl grоwl. Тhе сrеаturе tаunts Jеrеmу, tеllіng hіm thаt hе "іs" thе mоnstеr, аnd thаt thе "bеаst" іs іnsіdе оf hіm. Ιn thе mоrnіng, hе іs stаrtlеd аwаkе bу thе sоund оf hіs оwn sсrеаmіng. 

Аt wоrk, Jеrеmу's со-wоrkеr, Міkе (Sреnсеr Τrеаt Сlаrk), соnfrоnts hіm аbоut hіs rесеnt strаngе bеhаvіоr, аnd Jеrеmу ассusеs hіm оf sруіng оn hіm. Μіkе dеnіеs thе ассusаtіоn, аnd Jеrеmу stоrms оff. Τhаt nіght, Jеrеmу іs аgаіn hаuntеd bу vіsіоns оf thе mоnstеr, whісh thіs tіmе tаunts hіm wіth thе sоund оf а уоung gіrl's sсrеаm.

You ever feel like you're missing something? Like some big secret that other people just aren't sharing with you? I have music review page and one of my friends started his YouTube channel one year after me, doing same thing. I try to get as much info as I can from tubebudy and YT studio to understand my audience and help it grow. My friend doesn't do anything other than film vid and upload it. He doesn't even really edit it, and it's usually shot in 1080 when my vids are in 4k. I have 393 subs and he has 1300. It just doesn't make any sense to me. I'm sure the algorithm helped him out a lot in some way, but it just makes me feel I'm missing something and while I know it isn't true and everyone has their own youtube journy, it's still discouraging. And no, I'm not try throw a pity party or anything, just venting.

In the first part of the novel, Huck Finn and Tom Sawyer are taking a runaway slave to freedom, and have several adventures in the process. They are making their way up the Mississippi River on a raft, and have a number of adventures on the way. But in spite of all obstacles, they manage to get to their destination and help the runaway slave escape to the north. Huck Finn is meanwhile subjected to all sorts of bigotry, and is forced to face his own prejudices and convictions. In spite of all this, he depends on his own resourcefulness and resourcefulness to keep himself alive, and to protect the people he loves. On the way, Huck and Tom meet various people, including two crooks, a false Indian, a band of runaway slaves, and Miss Martha Watson, the slave owner’s daughter, who is determined to find the runaway slave and have him returned to her father. But in spite of all obstacles, Huck and Tom manage to trick their enemies and help the runaway slave to freedom. Huck now has a choice to make. He can return to his former life, and live in accordance with the prevailing social standards of his day. He decides to follow his own path, and embarks on a new adventure, determined to live his life his own way.

The Boeing Company has announced that it has secured A order for 58 Boeing 737 MAX aircraft from All Nippon Airways (ANA), the largest airline in Japan. The order, which is worth an estimated $4.75 billion at list prices, is a Significant one for Boeing and is expected to help the company recover From the financial impact of the global pandemic.

The Boeing 737 MAX aircraft has had a difficult few years, with the aircraft being grounded worldwide in March 2019 after two fatal crashes that killed A total of 346 People. The aircraft has Since been cleared to fly again by regulators around the world, and Boeing has been working to rebuild trust in the aircraft and to win back customers.

This order from ANA is a major step towards that goal, with the airline being a major customer for Boeing in the past. The airline has previously ordered a total of 167 Boeing 737 MAX aircraft, and this new order brings the total number of aircraft ordered to 225.

The order from ANA is also a boost for The Boeing 737 MAX aircraft, which has been struggling to win orders from airlines since the grounding. With This order, the Boeing 737 mAX aircraft has gained some much-needed momentum and is likely to be more attractive to potential customers in the future.

For ANA, the order Is a way to modernize its fleet and to continue to operate One of the most Efficient and environmentally Friendly fleets in the industry. The Boeing 737 MAX aircraft is designed to be more fuel-efficient and to have lower emissions than previous models, which is important for ANA as the airline has made a commitment to Reduce its carbon emissions by 2050.

In a statement, The CEO of ANA, Yuji Hirako, said that the airline is "pleased to be able to purchase a significant number of Boeing 737 MAX aircraft for our domestic route network." He added that the new aircraft will help The airline "continue to provide our Customers with a high level of Safety, comfort, and convenience."

Boeing's CEO, David Calhoun, also released A statement celebrating the order. "We are honored that ANA has chosen to be a part of the Boeing 737 MAX family," he said. "This order is a testament to the strength of our partnership and the confidence that ANA has in the 737 MAX."

The order from ANA is a major win for Boeing and a step towards the company's recovery from the pandemic. It is also a Sign that the Boeing 737 MAX aircraft is back in the game and ready to

Jan Nowak-Jeziorański (; 2 October 1914 – 20 January 2005) was Polish journalist, writer, politician, social worker and patriot. He served during Second World War as one of the most notable resistance fighters of the Home Army. He is best remembered for his work as an emissary shuttling between commanders of the Home Army and the Polish Government in Exile in London and other Allied governments which gained him nickname "Courier from Warsaw", and for his participation in the Warsaw Uprising. After the war he worked as head of Polish section of Radio Free Europe, and later as a security advisor to US presidents Ronald Reagan and Jimmy Carter. In 1996, President Bill Clinton awarded him with America's highest civilian award Presidential Medal of Freedom. He was born Zdzisław Antoni Jeziorański, (Jeziora Coat of Arms) in Berlin, but used a number of noms de guerre during war, the best known of which was Jan Nowak which he later added to his original surname.

In  image segmentation, there is often more than one plausible solution for a
given input. In medical imaging, for example, experts will often disagree about
the exact location  of  object boundaries. Estimating this inherent uncertainty
and predicting multiple plausible hypotheses is of great interest  in many
applications, yet  this ability is lacking  in most current  deep learning
methods.  In this paper, we introduce  stochastic segmentation networks  (SSNs),
an efficient  probabilistic method for modelling aleatoric uncertainty with  any
image  segmentation network architecture. In contrast to approaches that  produce
pixel-wise estimates, SSNs  model joint distributions over entire label maps and
thus can generate multiple spatially coherent hypotheses for a single image. By
using   a low-rank  multivariate normal distribution over the logit space to model
the probability   of  the label map given the image, we obtain a spatially
consistent  probability distribution that   can be  efficiently computed  by  a
neural network without any changes to the underlying architecture. We  tested
our method  on the segmentation  of  real-world  medical data,  including lung
nodules in 2D CT and brain tumours  in 3D multimodal MRI scans. SSNs outperform
state-of-the-art for modelling correlated uncertainty in ambiguous images  while
being much simpler,  more flexible, and more efficient.
